            impl UserRole {
                /// batch insert records
                ///
                /// sql: `INSERT INTO table_name (column1, column2, ...) VALUES (value1, value2, ...), (value1, value2, ...), ...`
                pub async fn insert_batch(
                    executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                    tables: &[UserRole],
                    batch_size: u64,
                ) -> std::result::Result<
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                > {
                    use ::rbatis::crud_traits::ColumnSet;
                    pub async fn insert_batch(
                        executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                        tables: &[UserRole],
                        table_name: &str,
                    ) -> std::result::Result<
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                    > {
                        let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                            2usize,
                        );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert("tables".to_string().into(), rbs::value(tables)?);
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "table_name".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(table_name)?,
                            );
                        {}
                        use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                        let driver_type = executor.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                        use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                        pub fn do_py_sql(
                            mut arg: rbs::Value,
                            _tag: char,
                        ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                            use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                            let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                &mut sql,
                                &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!(
                                            "insert into {0} ",
                                            &{ &arg["table_name"] }.string(),
                                        ),
                                    )
                                }),
                            );
                            sql.push_str(
                                &{
                                    let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1495usize);
                                    if arg["columns"] == rbs::Value::Null {}
                                    arg["columns"] = rbs::value({
                                            (&arg["tables"]).column_sets()
                                        })
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    for (ref idx, table) in { &arg["tables"] } {
                                        if { (idx).op_eq(&0i64) }.to_owned().into() {
                                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                &mut sql,
                                                "(",
                                            );
                                            sql.push_str(
                                                &{
                                                    let mut sql = String::with_capacity(259usize);
                                                    for (ref index, v) in { &arg["columns"] } {
                                                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                            &mut sql,
                                                            &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                                ::alloc::fmt::format(format_args!("{0},", &{ v }.string()))
                                                            }),
                                                        );
                                                    }
                                                    sql = sql
                                                        .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                        .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                        .to_string();
                                                    sql
                                                },
                                            );
                                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                &mut sql,
                                                ") VALUES ",
                                            );
                                        }
                                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                            &mut sql,
                                            "(",
                                        );
                                        sql.push_str(
                                            &{
                                                let mut sql = String::with_capacity(290usize);
                                                for (ref index, v) in { &arg["columns"] } {
                                                    args.push(rbs::value({ &table[v] }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        "?,",
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                sql = sql
                                                    .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                    .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                    .to_string();
                                                sql
                                            },
                                        );
                                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                            &mut sql,
                                            "),",
                                        );
                                    }
                                    sql = sql
                                        .trim_start_matches(",")
                                        .trim_end_matches(",")
                                        .to_string();
                                    sql
                                },
                            );
                            (sql, args)
                        }
                        let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(
                            rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map),
                            '?',
                        );
                        use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                        executor.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                    }
                    if tables.is_empty() {
                        return Err(
                            ::rbatis::rbdc::Error::from(
                                "insert can not insert empty array tables!",
                            ),
                        );
                    }
                    let mut table_name = "auth_admin_user_roles".to_string();
                    if table_name.is_empty() {
                        pub fn snake_name() -> String {
                            "user_role".to_string()
                        }
                        table_name = snake_name();
                    }
                    let mut result = ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult {
                        rows_affected: 0,
                        last_insert_id: rbs::Value::Null,
                    };
                    let ranges = ::rbatis::plugin::Page::<
                        (),
                    >::make_ranges(tables.len() as u64, batch_size);
                    for (offset, limit) in ranges {
                        let exec_result = insert_batch(
                                executor,
                                &tables[offset as usize..limit as usize],
                                table_name.as_str(),
                            )
                            .await?;
                        result.rows_affected += exec_result.rows_affected;
                        result.last_insert_id = exec_result.last_insert_id;
                    }
                    Ok(result)
                }
                /// insert a single record
                ///
                /// sql: `INSERT INTO table_name (column1, column2, ...) VALUES (value1, value2, ...)`
                pub async fn insert(
                    executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                    table: &UserRole,
                ) -> std::result::Result<
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                > {
                    <UserRole>::insert_batch(executor, std::slice::from_ref(table), 1)
                        .await
                }
            }
            impl UserRole {
                /// select records by condition map.
                /// supports "column" key in condition to select specific columns, e.g. `value!{"col1":"val1", "column": ["col1", "col2"]}`
                ///
                /// sql: `SELECT col1, col2, ... FROM table_name WHERE col1 = ? and col2 in (?, ?, ...)`
                ///
                /// condition map -> where sql:
                /// - `value!{"col1": "val1"}`                       -> `WHERE col1 = 'val1'`
                /// - `value!{"col1": 1, "col2": "val2"}`           -> `WHERE col1 = 1 and col2 = 'val2'`
                /// - `value!{"col1": ["v1", "v2", "v3"]}`          -> `WHERE col1 in ('v1', 'v2', 'v3')`
                /// - `value!{"col1": "val1", "col2": ["a", "b"]}`  -> `WHERE col1 = 'val1' and col2 in ('a', 'b')`
                /// - null values are skipped
                pub async fn select_by_map(
                    executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                    mut condition: rbs::Value,
                ) -> std::result::Result<Vec<UserRole>, ::rbatis::rbdc::Error> {
                    use rbatis::crud_traits::ValueOperatorSql;
                    let table_column = {
                        let mut columns = String::new();
                        let mut clean_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                            condition.len(),
                        );
                        for (k, v) in condition {
                            match k.as_str() {
                                Some("column") => {
                                    columns = match v {
                                        rbs::Value::String(s) => s.clone(),
                                        rbs::Value::Array(arr) => {
                                            let cols: Vec<&str> = arr
                                                .iter()
                                                .filter_map(|v| v.as_str())
                                                .collect();
                                            if cols.is_empty() {
                                                "*".to_string()
                                            } else {
                                                cols.join(", ")
                                            }
                                        }
                                        _ => "*".to_string(),
                                    };
                                }
                                _ => {
                                    clean_map.insert(k.clone(), v.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        if columns.is_empty() {
                            columns = "*".to_string();
                        }
                        condition = rbs::Value::Map(clean_map);
                        columns
                    };
                    pub async fn select_by_map(
                        executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                        table_name: String,
                        table_column: &str,
                        condition: &rbs::Value,
                    ) -> std::result::Result<Vec<UserRole>, ::rbatis::rbdc::Error> {
                        let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                            3usize,
                        );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "table_name".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(table_name)?,
                            );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "table_column".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(table_column)?,
                            );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "condition".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(condition)?,
                            );
                        {
                            for (_, v) in condition {
                                if v.is_array() && v.is_empty() {
                                    return Ok(::alloc::vec::Vec::new());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                        let driver_type = executor.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                        use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                        pub fn do_py_sql(
                            mut arg: rbs::Value,
                            _tag: char,
                        ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                            use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                            let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                &mut sql,
                                &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!(
                                            "select {0} from {1}",
                                            &{ &arg["table_column"] }.string(),
                                            &{ &arg["table_name"] }.string(),
                                        ),
                                    )
                                }),
                            );
                            sql.push_str(
                                &{
                                    let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1607usize);
                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                        &mut sql,
                                        " where ",
                                    );
                                    sql.push_str(
                                        &{
                                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1233usize);
                                            for (ref key, item) in { &arg["condition"] } {
                                                if { (item).op_eq(&rbs::Value::Null) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    continue;
                                                }
                                                if { !bool::from(item.is_array()) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    args.push(rbs::value({ item }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!(" and {0}?", &{ key.operator_sql() }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                if { item.is_array() }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!(" and {0} in (", &{ key }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                    sql.push_str(
                                                        &{
                                                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(285usize);
                                                            for (ref index, item_array) in { item } {
                                                                args.push(rbs::value({ item_array }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                                rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                                    &mut sql,
                                                                    "?,",
                                                                );
                                                            }
                                                            sql = sql
                                                                .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                                .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                                .to_string();
                                                            sql
                                                        },
                                                    );
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        ")",
                                                    );
                                                }
                                            }
                                            sql = sql
                                                .trim_start_matches(" and ")
                                                .trim_end_matches(" and ")
                                                .to_string();
                                            sql
                                        },
                                    );
                                    sql = sql.trim_end_matches(" where ").to_string();
                                    sql
                                },
                            );
                            (sql, args)
                        }
                        let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(
                            rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map),
                            '?',
                        );
                        use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                        let r = executor.query(&sql, rb_args).await?;
                        rbatis::decode::decode(r)
                    }
                    let mut table_name = "auth_admin_user_roles".to_string();
                    if table_name.is_empty() {
                        pub fn snake_name() -> String {
                            "user_role".to_string()
                        }
                        table_name = snake_name();
                    }
                    select_by_map(executor, table_name, &table_column, &condition).await
                }
            }
            impl UserRole {
                /// update records by condition map.
                /// supports "column" key in condition to update specific columns, e.g. `value!{"col1":"val1", "column": ["col2", "col3"]}`
                ///
                /// sql: `UPDATE table_name SET col1 = ?, col2 = ?, ... WHERE col1 = ? and col2 in (?, ?, ...)`
                /// note: skips null fields by default, skips 'id' field always
                ///
                /// condition map -> where sql:
                /// - `value!{"col1": "val1"}`                       -> `WHERE col1 = 'val1'`
                /// - `value!{"col1": 1, "col2": "val2"}`           -> `WHERE col1 = 1 and col2 = 'val2'`
                /// - `value!{"col1": ["v1", "v2", "v3"]}`          -> `WHERE col1 in ('v1', 'v2', 'v3')`
                /// - `value!{"col1": "val1", "col2": ["a", "b"]}`  -> `WHERE col1 = 'val1' and col2 in ('a', 'b')`
                /// - null values are skipped
                pub async fn update_by_map(
                    executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                    table: &UserRole,
                    mut condition: rbs::Value,
                ) -> std::result::Result<
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                > {
                    use rbatis::crud_traits::{FilterByColumns, ValueOperatorSql};
                    let set_columns = {
                        let mut columns = rbs::Value::Null;
                        let mut clean_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                            condition.len(),
                        );
                        for (k, v) in condition {
                            match k.as_str() {
                                Some("column") => {
                                    columns = match v {
                                        rbs::Value::String(s) => {
                                            rbs::Value::Array(
                                                <[_]>::into_vec(
                                                    ::alloc::boxed::box_new([rbs::Value::String(s.clone())]),
                                                ),
                                            )
                                        }
                                        rbs::Value::Array(arr) => {
                                            let filtered_array: Vec<rbs::Value> = arr
                                                .iter()
                                                .filter(|v| v.as_str().is_some())
                                                .cloned()
                                                .collect();
                                            if filtered_array.is_empty() {
                                                rbs::Value::Null
                                            } else {
                                                rbs::Value::Array(filtered_array)
                                            }
                                        }
                                        _ => rbs::Value::Null,
                                    };
                                }
                                _ => {
                                    clean_map.insert(k.clone(), v.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        condition = rbs::Value::Map(clean_map);
                        columns
                    };
                    pub async fn update_by_map_internal(
                        executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                        table_name: String,
                        table: &rbs::Value,
                        condition: &rbs::Value,
                        skip_null: bool,
                    ) -> std::result::Result<
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                    > {
                        let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                            4usize,
                        );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "table_name".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(table_name)?,
                            );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert("table".to_string().into(), rbs::value(table)?);
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "condition".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(condition)?,
                            );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "skip_null".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(skip_null)?,
                            );
                        {
                            for (_, v) in condition {
                                if v.is_array() && v.is_empty() {
                                    return Ok(::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult::default());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                        let driver_type = executor.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                        use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                        pub fn do_py_sql(
                            mut arg: rbs::Value,
                            _tag: char,
                        ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                            use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                            let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                &mut sql,
                                &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!("update {0}", &{ &arg["table_name"] }.string()),
                                    )
                                }),
                            );
                            if { (&arg["skip_null"]).op_eq(&false) }.to_owned().into() {
                                sql.push_str(" set ");
                                sql.push_str(
                                    &{
                                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(553usize);
                                        sql.push_str(
                                            &{
                                                let mut sql = String::with_capacity(372usize);
                                                for (ref k, v) in { &arg["table"] } {
                                                    if { (k).op_eq(&"id") }.to_owned().into() {
                                                        continue;
                                                    }
                                                    args.push(rbs::value({ v }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!("{0}=?,", &{ k }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                sql = sql
                                                    .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                    .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                    .to_string();
                                                sql
                                            },
                                        );
                                        sql = sql
                                            .trim_start_matches(" ")
                                            .trim_end_matches(" ")
                                            .to_string();
                                        sql
                                    },
                                );
                                sql.push_str(" ");
                            }
                            if { (&arg["skip_null"]).op_eq(&true) }.to_owned().into() {
                                sql.push_str(" set ");
                                sql.push_str(
                                    &{
                                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(634usize);
                                        sql.push_str(
                                            &{
                                                let mut sql = String::with_capacity(449usize);
                                                for (ref k, v) in { &arg["table"] } {
                                                    if { (k).op_eq(&"id") }.to_owned().into() {
                                                        continue;
                                                    }
                                                    if { (v).op_eq(&rbs::Value::Null) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                        continue;
                                                    }
                                                    args.push(rbs::value({ v }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!("{0}=?,", &{ k }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                sql = sql
                                                    .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                    .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                    .to_string();
                                                sql
                                            },
                                        );
                                        sql = sql
                                            .trim_start_matches(" ")
                                            .trim_end_matches(" ")
                                            .to_string();
                                        sql
                                    },
                                );
                                sql.push_str(" ");
                            }
                            sql.push_str(
                                &{
                                    let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1607usize);
                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                        &mut sql,
                                        " where ",
                                    );
                                    sql.push_str(
                                        &{
                                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1233usize);
                                            for (ref key, item) in { &arg["condition"] } {
                                                if { (item).op_eq(&rbs::Value::Null) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    continue;
                                                }
                                                if { !bool::from(item.is_array()) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    args.push(rbs::value({ item }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!(" and {0}?", &{ key.operator_sql() }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                if { item.is_array() }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!(" and {0} in (", &{ key }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                    sql.push_str(
                                                        &{
                                                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(285usize);
                                                            for (ref index, item_array) in { item } {
                                                                args.push(rbs::value({ item_array }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                                rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                                    &mut sql,
                                                                    "?,",
                                                                );
                                                            }
                                                            sql = sql
                                                                .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                                .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                                .to_string();
                                                            sql
                                                        },
                                                    );
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        ")",
                                                    );
                                                }
                                            }
                                            sql = sql
                                                .trim_start_matches(" and ")
                                                .trim_end_matches(" and ")
                                                .to_string();
                                            sql
                                        },
                                    );
                                    sql = sql.trim_end_matches(" where ").to_string();
                                    sql
                                },
                            );
                            (sql, args)
                        }
                        let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(
                            rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map),
                            '?',
                        );
                        use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                        executor.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                    }
                    let mut table_name = "auth_admin_user_roles".to_string();
                    if table_name.is_empty() {
                        pub fn snake_name() -> String {
                            "user_role".to_string()
                        }
                        table_name = snake_name();
                    }
                    let table_value = ::rbs::value(table).unwrap_or_default();
                    let mut skip_null = true;
                    let table = if set_columns != rbs::Value::Null {
                        skip_null = false;
                        table_value.filter_by_columns(&set_columns)
                    } else {
                        table_value
                    };
                    update_by_map_internal(
                            executor,
                            table_name,
                            &table,
                            &condition,
                            skip_null,
                        )
                        .await
                }
            }
            impl UserRole {
                /// delete records by condition map
                ///
                /// sql: `DELETE FROM table_name WHERE col1 = ? and col2 in (?, ?, ...)`
                ///
                /// condition map -> where sql:
                /// - `value!{"col1": "val1"}`                       -> `WHERE col1 = 'val1'`
                /// - `value!{"col1": 1, "col2": "val2"}`           -> `WHERE col1 = 1 and col2 = 'val2'`
                /// - `value!{"col1": ["v1", "v2", "v3"]}`          -> `WHERE col1 in ('v1', 'v2', 'v3')`
                /// - `value!{"col1": "val1", "col2": ["a", "b"]}`  -> `WHERE col1 = 'val1' and col2 in ('a', 'b')`
                /// - null values are skipped
                pub async fn delete_by_map(
                    executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                    condition: rbs::Value,
                ) -> std::result::Result<
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                > {
                    use rbatis::crud_traits::ValueOperatorSql;
                    pub async fn delete_by_map(
                        executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                        table_name: String,
                        condition: &rbs::Value,
                    ) -> std::result::Result<
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                    > {
                        let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                            2usize,
                        );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "table_name".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(table_name)?,
                            );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "condition".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(condition)?,
                            );
                        {
                            for (_, v) in condition {
                                if v.is_array() && v.is_empty() {
                                    return Ok(::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult::default());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                        let driver_type = executor.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                        use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                        pub fn do_py_sql(
                            mut arg: rbs::Value,
                            _tag: char,
                        ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                            use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                            let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                &mut sql,
                                &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!(
                                            "delete from {0}",
                                            &{ &arg["table_name"] }.string(),
                                        ),
                                    )
                                }),
                            );
                            sql.push_str(
                                &{
                                    let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1607usize);
                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                        &mut sql,
                                        " where ",
                                    );
                                    sql.push_str(
                                        &{
                                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1233usize);
                                            for (ref key, item) in { &arg["condition"] } {
                                                if { (item).op_eq(&rbs::Value::Null) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    continue;
                                                }
                                                if { !bool::from(item.is_array()) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    args.push(rbs::value({ item }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!(" and {0}?", &{ key.operator_sql() }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                if { item.is_array() }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!(" and {0} in (", &{ key }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                    sql.push_str(
                                                        &{
                                                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(285usize);
                                                            for (ref index, item_array) in { item } {
                                                                args.push(rbs::value({ item_array }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                                rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                                    &mut sql,
                                                                    "?,",
                                                                );
                                                            }
                                                            sql = sql
                                                                .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                                .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                                .to_string();
                                                            sql
                                                        },
                                                    );
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        ")",
                                                    );
                                                }
                                            }
                                            sql = sql
                                                .trim_start_matches(" and ")
                                                .trim_end_matches(" and ")
                                                .to_string();
                                            sql
                                        },
                                    );
                                    sql = sql.trim_end_matches(" where ").to_string();
                                    sql
                                },
                            );
                            (sql, args)
                        }
                        let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(
                            rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map),
                            '?',
                        );
                        use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                        executor.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                    }
                    let mut table_name = "auth_admin_user_roles".to_string();
                    if table_name.is_empty() {
                        pub fn snake_name() -> String {
                            "user_role".to_string()
                        }
                        table_name = snake_name();
                    }
                    delete_by_map(executor, table_name, &condition).await
                }
            }
        }
        pub mod application_entity {
            //! 应用实体
            use rbatis::crud;
            use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
            use salvo::oapi::ToSchema;
            pub struct ApplicationEntity {
                pub id: Option<i64>,
                pub app_name: Option<String>,
                pub display_name: Option<String>,
                pub description: Option<String>,
                pub base_url: Option<String>,
                pub status: Option<i8>,
                pub created_at: Option<rbdc::DateTime>,
                pub updated_at: Option<rbdc::DateTime>,
            }
            #[automatically_derived]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for ApplicationEntity {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    let names: &'static _ = &[
                        "id",
                        "app_name",
                        "display_name",
                        "description",
                        "base_url",
                        "status",
                        "created_at",
                        "updated_at",
                    ];
                    let values: &[&dyn ::core::fmt::Debug] = &[
                        &self.id,
                        &self.app_name,
                        &self.display_name,
                        &self.description,
                        &self.base_url,
                        &self.status,
                        &self.created_at,
                        &&self.updated_at,
                    ];
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::debug_struct_fields_finish(
                        f,
                        "ApplicationEntity",
                        names,
                        values,
                    )
                }
            }
            #[automatically_derived]
            impl ::core::clone::Clone for ApplicationEntity {
                #[inline]
                fn clone(&self) -> ApplicationEntity {
                    ApplicationEntity {
                        id: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.id),
                        app_name: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.app_name),
                        display_name: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.display_name),
                        description: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.description),

                        status: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.status),
                        created_at: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.created_at),
                        updated_at: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.updated_at),
                    }
                }
            }

                        &self,

                    where

            #[doc(hidden)]
            #[allow(
                non_upper_case_globals,
                unused_attributes,
                unused_qualifications,
                clippy::absolute_paths,
            )]
            const _: () = {
                #[allow(unused_extern_crates, clippy::useless_attribute)]
                extern crate serde as _serde;
                #[automatically_derived]
                impl<'de> _serde::Deserialize<'de> for ApplicationEntity {
                    fn deserialize<__D>(
                        __deserializer: __D,
                    ) -> _serde::__private228::Result<Self, __D::Error>
                    where
                        __D: _serde::Deserializer<'de>,
                    {
                        #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
                        #[doc(hidden)]
                        enum __Field {
                            __field0,
                            __field1,
                            __field2,
                            __field3,
                            __field4,
                            __field5,
                            __field6,
                            __field7,
                            __ignore,
                        }
                        #[doc(hidden)]
                        struct __FieldVisitor;
                        #[automatically_derived]
                        impl<'de> _serde::de::Visitor<'de> for __FieldVisitor {
                            type Value = __Field;
                            fn expecting(
                                &self,
                                __formatter: &mut _serde::__private228::Formatter,
                            ) -> _serde::__private228::fmt::Result {
                                _serde::__private228::Formatter::write_str(
                                    __formatter,
                                    "field identifier",
                                )
                            }
                            fn visit_u64<__E>(
                                self,
                                __value: u64,
                            ) -> _serde::__private228::Result<Self::Value, __E>
                            where
                                __E: _serde::de::Error,
                            {
                                match __value {
                                    0u64 => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field0),
                                    1u64 => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field1),
                                    2u64 => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field2),
                                    3u64 => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field3),
                                    4u64 => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field4),
                                    5u64 => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field5),
                                    6u64 => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field6),
                                    7u64 => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field7),
                                    _ => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__ignore),
                                }
                            }
                            fn visit_str<__E>(
                                self,
                                __value: &str,
                            ) -> _serde::__private228::Result<Self::Value, __E>
                            where
                                __E: _serde::de::Error,
                            {
                                match __value {
                                    "id" => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field0),
                                    "app_name" => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field1),
                                    "display_name" => {
                                        _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field2)
                                    }
                                    "description" => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field3),
                                    "base_url" => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field4),
                                    "status" => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field5),
                                    "created_at" => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field6),
                                    "updated_at" => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field7),
                                    _ => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__ignore),
                                }
                            }
                            fn visit_bytes<__E>(
                                self,
                                __value: &[u8],
                            ) -> _serde::__private228::Result<Self::Value, __E>
                            where
                                __E: _serde::de::Error,
                            {
                                match __value {
                                    b"id" => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field0),
                                    b"app_name" => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field1),
                                    b"display_name" => {
                                        _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field2)
                                    }
                                    b"description" => {
                                        _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field3)
                                    }
                                    b"base_url" => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field4),
                                    b"status" => _serde::__private228::Ok(__Field::__field5),

            impl salvo::oapi::ToSchema for ApplicationEntity {
                fn to_schema(
                    components: &mut salvo::oapi::Components,
                ) -> salvo::oapi::RefOr<salvo::oapi::schema::Schema> {
                    let name = salvo::oapi::naming::assign_name::<
                        ApplicationEntity,
                    >(salvo::oapi::naming::NameRule::Auto);
                    let ref_or = salvo::oapi::RefOr::Ref(
                        salvo::oapi::Ref::new(
                            ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                    format_args!("#/components/schemas/{0}", name),
                                )
                            }),
                        ),
                    );
                    if !components.schemas.contains_key(&name) {
                        components.schemas.insert(name.clone(), ref_or.clone());
                        let schema = salvo::oapi::Object::new()
                            .property(
                                "id",

                                        salvo::oapi::schema::SchemaType::from_iter([

                                        ]),

                                    .format(

                                            salvo::oapi::KnownFormat::Int64,
                                        ),
                                    ),
                            )

                                    .schema_type(
                                        salvo::oapi::schema::SchemaType::from_iter([
                                            salvo::oapi::schema::BasicType::String,
                                            salvo::oapi::schema::BasicType::Null,
