            impl ApplicationEntity {
                /// batch insert records
                ///
                /// sql: `INSERT INTO table_name (column1, column2, ...) VALUES (value1, value2, ...), (value1, value2, ...), ...`
                pub async fn insert_batch(
                    executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                    tables: &[ApplicationEntity],
                    batch_size: u64,
                ) -> std::result::Result<
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                > {
                    use ::rbatis::crud_traits::ColumnSet;
                    pub async fn insert_batch(
                        executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                        tables: &[ApplicationEntity],
                        table_name: &str,
                    ) -> std::result::Result<
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                    > {
                        let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                            2usize,
                        );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert("tables".to_string().into(), rbs::value(tables)?);
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "table_name".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(table_name)?,
                            );
                        {}
                        use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                        let driver_type = executor.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                        use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                        pub fn do_py_sql(
                            mut arg: rbs::Value,
                            _tag: char,
                        ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                            use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                            let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                &mut sql,
                                &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!(
                                            "insert into {0} ",
                                            &{ &arg["table_name"] }.string(),
                                        ),
                                    )
                                }),
                            );
                            sql.push_str(
                                &{
                                    let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1495usize);
                                    if arg["columns"] == rbs::Value::Null {}
                                    arg["columns"] = rbs::value({
                                            (&arg["tables"]).column_sets()
                                        })
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    for (ref idx, table) in { &arg["tables"] } {
                                        if { (idx).op_eq(&0i64) }.to_owned().into() {
                                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                &mut sql,
                                                "(",
                                            );
                                            sql.push_str(
                                                &{
                                                    let mut sql = String::with_capacity(259usize);
                                                    for (ref index, v) in { &arg["columns"] } {
                                                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                            &mut sql,
                                                            &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                                ::alloc::fmt::format(format_args!("{0},", &{ v }.string()))
                                                            }),
                                                        );
                                                    }
                                                    sql = sql
                                                        .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                        .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                        .to_string();
                                                    sql
                                                },
                                            );
                                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                &mut sql,
                                                ") VALUES ",
                                            );
                                        }
                                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                            &mut sql,
                                            "(",
                                        );
                                        sql.push_str(
                                            &{
                                                let mut sql = String::with_capacity(290usize);
                                                for (ref index, v) in { &arg["columns"] } {
                                                    args.push(rbs::value({ &table[v] }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        "?,",
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                sql = sql
                                                    .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                    .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                    .to_string();
                                                sql
                                            },
                                        );
                                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                            &mut sql,
                                            "),",
                                        );
                                    }
                                    sql = sql
                                        .trim_start_matches(",")
                                        .trim_end_matches(",")
                                        .to_string();
                                    sql
                                },
                            );
                            (sql, args)
                        }
                        let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(
                            rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map),
                            '?',
                        );
                        use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                        executor.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                    }
                    if tables.is_empty() {
                        return Err(
                            ::rbatis::rbdc::Error::from(
                                "insert can not insert empty array tables!",
                            ),
                        );
                    }
                    let mut table_name = "auth_applications".to_string();
                    if table_name.is_empty() {
                        pub fn snake_name() -> String {
                            "application_entity".to_string()
                        }
                        table_name = snake_name();
                    }
                    let mut result = ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult {
                        rows_affected: 0,
                        last_insert_id: rbs::Value::Null,
                    };
                    let ranges = ::rbatis::plugin::Page::<
                        (),
                    >::make_ranges(tables.len() as u64, batch_size);
                    for (offset, limit) in ranges {
                        let exec_result = insert_batch(
                                executor,
                                &tables[offset as usize..limit as usize],
                                table_name.as_str(),
                            )
                            .await?;
                        result.rows_affected += exec_result.rows_affected;
                        result.last_insert_id = exec_result.last_insert_id;
                    }
                    Ok(result)
                }
                /// insert a single record
                ///
                /// sql: `INSERT INTO table_name (column1, column2, ...) VALUES (value1, value2, ...)`
                pub async fn insert(
                    executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                    table: &ApplicationEntity,
                ) -> std::result::Result<
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                > {
                    <ApplicationEntity>::insert_batch(
                            executor,
                            std::slice::from_ref(table),
                            1,
                        )
                        .await
                }
            }
            impl ApplicationEntity {
                /// select records by condition map.
                /// supports "column" key in condition to select specific columns, e.g. `value!{"col1":"val1", "column": ["col1", "col2"]}`
                ///
                /// sql: `SELECT col1, col2, ... FROM table_name WHERE col1 = ? and col2 in (?, ?, ...)`
                ///
                /// condition map -> where sql:
                /// - `value!{"col1": "val1"}`                       -> `WHERE col1 = 'val1'`
                /// - `value!{"col1": 1, "col2": "val2"}`           -> `WHERE col1 = 1 and col2 = 'val2'`
                /// - `value!{"col1": ["v1", "v2", "v3"]}`          -> `WHERE col1 in ('v1', 'v2', 'v3')`
                /// - `value!{"col1": "val1", "col2": ["a", "b"]}`  -> `WHERE col1 = 'val1' and col2 in ('a', 'b')`
                /// - null values are skipped
                pub async fn select_by_map(
                    executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                    mut condition: rbs::Value,
                ) -> std::result::Result<Vec<ApplicationEntity>, ::rbatis::rbdc::Error> {
                    use rbatis::crud_traits::ValueOperatorSql;
                    let table_column = {
                        let mut columns = String::new();
                        let mut clean_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                            condition.len(),
                        );
                        for (k, v) in condition {
                            match k.as_str() {
                                Some("column") => {
                                    columns = match v {
                                        rbs::Value::String(s) => s.clone(),
                                        rbs::Value::Array(arr) => {
                                            let cols: Vec<&str> = arr
                                                .iter()
                                                .filter_map(|v| v.as_str())
                                                .collect();
                                            if cols.is_empty() {
                                                "*".to_string()
                                            } else {
                                                cols.join(", ")
                                            }
                                        }
                                        _ => "*".to_string(),
                                    };
                                }
                                _ => {
                                    clean_map.insert(k.clone(), v.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        if columns.is_empty() {
                            columns = "*".to_string();
                        }
                        condition = rbs::Value::Map(clean_map);
                        columns
                    };
                    pub async fn select_by_map(
                        executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                        table_name: String,
                        table_column: &str,
                        condition: &rbs::Value,
                    ) -> std::result::Result<
                        Vec<ApplicationEntity>,
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                    > {
                        let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                            3usize,
                        );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "table_name".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(table_name)?,
                            );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "table_column".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(table_column)?,
                            );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "condition".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(condition)?,
                            );
                        {
                            for (_, v) in condition {
                                if v.is_array() && v.is_empty() {
                                    return Ok(::alloc::vec::Vec::new());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                        let driver_type = executor.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                        use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                        pub fn do_py_sql(
                            mut arg: rbs::Value,
                            _tag: char,
                        ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                            use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                            let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                &mut sql,
                                &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!(
                                            "select {0} from {1}",
                                            &{ &arg["table_column"] }.string(),
                                            &{ &arg["table_name"] }.string(),
                                        ),
                                    )
                                }),
                            );
                            sql.push_str(
                                &{
                                    let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1607usize);
                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                        &mut sql,
                                        " where ",
                                    );
                                    sql.push_str(
                                        &{
                                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1233usize);
                                            for (ref key, item) in { &arg["condition"] } {
                                                if { (item).op_eq(&rbs::Value::Null) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    continue;
                                                }
                                                if { !bool::from(item.is_array()) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    args.push(rbs::value({ item }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!(" and {0}?", &{ key.operator_sql() }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                if { item.is_array() }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!(" and {0} in (", &{ key }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                    sql.push_str(
                                                        &{
                                                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(285usize);
                                                            for (ref index, item_array) in { item } {
                                                                args.push(rbs::value({ item_array }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                                rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                                    &mut sql,
                                                                    "?,",
                                                                );
                                                            }
                                                            sql = sql
                                                                .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                                .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                                .to_string();
                                                            sql
                                                        },
                                                    );
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        ")",
                                                    );
                                                }
                                            }
                                            sql = sql
                                                .trim_start_matches(" and ")
                                                .trim_end_matches(" and ")
                                                .to_string();
                                            sql
                                        },
                                    );
                                    sql = sql.trim_end_matches(" where ").to_string();
                                    sql
                                },
                            );
                            (sql, args)
                        }
                        let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(
                            rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map),
                            '?',
                        );
                        use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                        let r = executor.query(&sql, rb_args).await?;
                        rbatis::decode::decode(r)
                    }
                    let mut table_name = "auth_applications".to_string();
                    if table_name.is_empty() {
                        pub fn snake_name() -> String {
                            "application_entity".to_string()
                        }
                        table_name = snake_name();
                    }
                    select_by_map(executor, table_name, &table_column, &condition).await
                }
            }
            impl ApplicationEntity {
                /// update records by condition map.
                /// supports "column" key in condition to update specific columns, e.g. `value!{"col1":"val1", "column": ["col2", "col3"]}`
                ///
                /// sql: `UPDATE table_name SET col1 = ?, col2 = ?, ... WHERE col1 = ? and col2 in (?, ?, ...)`
                /// note: skips null fields by default, skips 'id' field always
                ///
                /// condition map -> where sql:
                /// - `value!{"col1": "val1"}`                       -> `WHERE col1 = 'val1'`
                /// - `value!{"col1": 1, "col2": "val2"}`           -> `WHERE col1 = 1 and col2 = 'val2'`
                /// - `value!{"col1": ["v1", "v2", "v3"]}`          -> `WHERE col1 in ('v1', 'v2', 'v3')`
                /// - `value!{"col1": "val1", "col2": ["a", "b"]}`  -> `WHERE col1 = 'val1' and col2 in ('a', 'b')`
                /// - null values are skipped
                pub async fn update_by_map(
                    executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                    table: &ApplicationEntity,
                    mut condition: rbs::Value,
                ) -> std::result::Result<
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                > {
                    use rbatis::crud_traits::{FilterByColumns, ValueOperatorSql};
                    let set_columns = {
                        let mut columns = rbs::Value::Null;
                        let mut clean_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                            condition.len(),
                        );
                        for (k, v) in condition {
                            match k.as_str() {
                                Some("column") => {
                                    columns = match v {
                                        rbs::Value::String(s) => {
                                            rbs::Value::Array(
                                                <[_]>::into_vec(
                                                    ::alloc::boxed::box_new([rbs::Value::String(s.clone())]),
                                                ),
                                            )
                                        }
                                        rbs::Value::Array(arr) => {
                                            let filtered_array: Vec<rbs::Value> = arr
                                                .iter()
                                                .filter(|v| v.as_str().is_some())
                                                .cloned()
                                                .collect();
                                            if filtered_array.is_empty() {
                                                rbs::Value::Null
                                            } else {
                                                rbs::Value::Array(filtered_array)
                                            }
                                        }
                                        _ => rbs::Value::Null,
                                    };
                                }
                                _ => {
                                    clean_map.insert(k.clone(), v.clone());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        condition = rbs::Value::Map(clean_map);
                        columns
                    };
                    pub async fn update_by_map_internal(
                        executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                        table_name: String,
                        table: &rbs::Value,
                        condition: &rbs::Value,
                        skip_null: bool,
                    ) -> std::result::Result<
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                    > {
                        let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                            4usize,
                        );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "table_name".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(table_name)?,
                            );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert("table".to_string().into(), rbs::value(table)?);
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "condition".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(condition)?,
                            );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "skip_null".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(skip_null)?,
                            );
                        {
                            for (_, v) in condition {
                                if v.is_array() && v.is_empty() {
                                    return Ok(::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult::default());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                        let driver_type = executor.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                        use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                        pub fn do_py_sql(
                            mut arg: rbs::Value,
                            _tag: char,
                        ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                            use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                            let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                &mut sql,
                                &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!("update {0}", &{ &arg["table_name"] }.string()),
                                    )
                                }),
                            );
                            if { (&arg["skip_null"]).op_eq(&false) }.to_owned().into() {
                                sql.push_str(" set ");
                                sql.push_str(
                                    &{
                                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(553usize);
                                        sql.push_str(
                                            &{
                                                let mut sql = String::with_capacity(372usize);
                                                for (ref k, v) in { &arg["table"] } {
                                                    if { (k).op_eq(&"id") }.to_owned().into() {
                                                        continue;
                                                    }
                                                    args.push(rbs::value({ v }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!("{0}=?,", &{ k }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                sql = sql
                                                    .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                    .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                    .to_string();
                                                sql
                                            },
                                        );
                                        sql = sql
                                            .trim_start_matches(" ")
                                            .trim_end_matches(" ")
                                            .to_string();
                                        sql
                                    },
                                );
                                sql.push_str(" ");
                            }
                            if { (&arg["skip_null"]).op_eq(&true) }.to_owned().into() {
                                sql.push_str(" set ");
                                sql.push_str(
                                    &{
                                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(634usize);
                                        sql.push_str(
                                            &{
                                                let mut sql = String::with_capacity(449usize);
                                                for (ref k, v) in { &arg["table"] } {
                                                    if { (k).op_eq(&"id") }.to_owned().into() {
                                                        continue;
                                                    }
                                                    if { (v).op_eq(&rbs::Value::Null) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                        continue;
                                                    }
                                                    args.push(rbs::value({ v }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!("{0}=?,", &{ k }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                sql = sql
                                                    .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                    .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                    .to_string();
                                                sql
                                            },
                                        );
                                        sql = sql
                                            .trim_start_matches(" ")
                                            .trim_end_matches(" ")
                                            .to_string();
                                        sql
                                    },
                                );
                                sql.push_str(" ");
                            }
                            sql.push_str(
                                &{
                                    let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1607usize);
                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                        &mut sql,
                                        " where ",
                                    );
                                    sql.push_str(
                                        &{
                                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1233usize);
                                            for (ref key, item) in { &arg["condition"] } {
                                                if { (item).op_eq(&rbs::Value::Null) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    continue;
                                                }
                                                if { !bool::from(item.is_array()) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    args.push(rbs::value({ item }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!(" and {0}?", &{ key.operator_sql() }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                if { item.is_array() }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!(" and {0} in (", &{ key }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                    sql.push_str(
                                                        &{
                                                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(285usize);
                                                            for (ref index, item_array) in { item } {
                                                                args.push(rbs::value({ item_array }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                                rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                                    &mut sql,
                                                                    "?,",
                                                                );
                                                            }
                                                            sql = sql
                                                                .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                                .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                                .to_string();
                                                            sql
                                                        },
                                                    );
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        ")",
                                                    );
                                                }
                                            }
                                            sql = sql
                                                .trim_start_matches(" and ")
                                                .trim_end_matches(" and ")
                                                .to_string();
                                            sql
                                        },
                                    );
                                    sql = sql.trim_end_matches(" where ").to_string();
                                    sql
                                },
                            );
                            (sql, args)
                        }
                        let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(
                            rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map),
                            '?',
                        );
                        use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                        executor.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                    }
                    let mut table_name = "auth_applications".to_string();
                    if table_name.is_empty() {
                        pub fn snake_name() -> String {
                            "application_entity".to_string()
                        }
                        table_name = snake_name();
                    }
                    let table_value = ::rbs::value(table).unwrap_or_default();
                    let mut skip_null = true;
                    let table = if set_columns != rbs::Value::Null {
                        skip_null = false;
                        table_value.filter_by_columns(&set_columns)
                    } else {
                        table_value
                    };
                    update_by_map_internal(
                            executor,
                            table_name,
                            &table,
                            &condition,
                            skip_null,
                        )
                        .await
                }
            }
            impl ApplicationEntity {
                /// delete records by condition map
                ///
                /// sql: `DELETE FROM table_name WHERE col1 = ? and col2 in (?, ?, ...)`
                ///
                /// condition map -> where sql:
                /// - `value!{"col1": "val1"}`                       -> `WHERE col1 = 'val1'`
                /// - `value!{"col1": 1, "col2": "val2"}`           -> `WHERE col1 = 1 and col2 = 'val2'`
                /// - `value!{"col1": ["v1", "v2", "v3"]}`          -> `WHERE col1 in ('v1', 'v2', 'v3')`
                /// - `value!{"col1": "val1", "col2": ["a", "b"]}`  -> `WHERE col1 = 'val1' and col2 in ('a', 'b')`
                /// - null values are skipped
                pub async fn delete_by_map(
                    executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                    condition: rbs::Value,
                ) -> std::result::Result<
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                    ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                > {
                    use rbatis::crud_traits::ValueOperatorSql;
                    pub async fn delete_by_map(
                        executor: &dyn ::rbatis::executor::Executor,
                        table_name: String,
                        condition: &rbs::Value,
                    ) -> std::result::Result<
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult,
                        ::rbatis::rbdc::Error,
                    > {
                        let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                            2usize,
                        );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "table_name".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(table_name)?,
                            );
                        rb_arg_map
                            .insert(
                                "condition".to_string().into(),
                                rbs::value(condition)?,
                            );
                        {
                            for (_, v) in condition {
                                if v.is_array() && v.is_empty() {
                                    return Ok(::rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult::default());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                        let driver_type = executor.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                        use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                        pub fn do_py_sql(
                            mut arg: rbs::Value,
                            _tag: char,
                        ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                            use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                            let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                &mut sql,
                                &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!(
                                            "delete from {0}",
                                            &{ &arg["table_name"] }.string(),
                                        ),
                                    )
                                }),
                            );
                            sql.push_str(
                                &{
                                    let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1607usize);
                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                        &mut sql,
                                        " where ",
                                    );
                                    sql.push_str(
                                        &{
                                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1233usize);
                                            for (ref key, item) in { &arg["condition"] } {
                                                if { (item).op_eq(&rbs::Value::Null) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    continue;
                                                }
                                                if { !bool::from(item.is_array()) }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    args.push(rbs::value({ item }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!(" and {0}?", &{ key.operator_sql() }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                if { item.is_array() }.to_owned().into() {
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                                format_args!(" and {0} in (", &{ key }.string()),
                                                            )
                                                        }),
                                                    );
                                                    sql.push_str(
                                                        &{
                                                            let mut sql = String::with_capacity(285usize);
                                                            for (ref index, item_array) in { item } {
                                                                args.push(rbs::value({ item_array }).unwrap_or_default());
                                                                rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                                    &mut sql,
                                                                    "?,",
                                                                );
                                                            }
                                                            sql = sql
                                                                .trim_start_matches(",")
                                                                .trim_end_matches(",")
                                                                .to_string();
                                                            sql
                                                        },
                                                    );
                                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                                        &mut sql,
                                                        ")",
                                                    );
                                                }
                                            }
                                            sql = sql
                                                .trim_start_matches(" and ")
                                                .trim_end_matches(" and ")
                                                .to_string();
                                            sql
                                        },
                                    );
                                    sql = sql.trim_end_matches(" where ").to_string();
                                    sql
                                },
                            );
                            (sql, args)
                        }
                        let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(
                            rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map),
                            '?',
                        );
                        use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                        executor.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                    }
                    let mut table_name = "auth_applications".to_string();
                    if table_name.is_empty() {
                        pub fn snake_name() -> String {
                            "application_entity".to_string()
                        }
                        table_name = snake_name();
                    }
                    delete_by_map(executor, table_name, &condition).await
                }
            }
        }
        pub use department_entity::AdminDepartment;
        pub use permission_entity::AdminPermission;
        pub use role_entity::{AdminRole, RolePermission};
        pub use user_entity::{AdminUser, UserRole};
        pub use application_entity::ApplicationEntity;
    }
    pub mod event {
        //! 领域事件模块
        //!
        //! 事件类型统一由 genies_auth::event 提供，此处保留模块结构以便未来扩展。
        pub mod role_event {
            //! 角色领域事件 — 统一使用 genies_auth::event 中的定义
        }
        pub mod user_event {
            //! 用户领域事件 — 统一使用 genies_auth::event 中的定义
        }
    }
    pub mod repository {
        pub mod user_repository {
            //! 用户与用户-角色关联 Repository
            //!
            //! 从 user_entity.rs 迁移的 SQL 方法，使用 RBatis `#[py_sql]` 宏重写。
            use rbatis::executor::Executor;
            use rbatis::py_sql;
            use rbatis::rbdc::db::ExecResult;
            use crate::domain::entity::user_entity::{AdminUser, UserRole};
            use crate::domain::entity::role_entity::AdminRole;
            impl AdminUser {
                pub async fn create_user(
                    rb: &dyn Executor,
                    username: &str,
                    password_hash: &str,
                    display_name: &str,
                    email: &str,
                    phone: &str,
                    avatar: &str,
                    status: &i8,
                ) -> rbatis::Result<ExecResult> {
                    let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                        7usize,
                    );
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert("username".to_string().into(), rbs::value(username)?);
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert(
                            "password_hash".to_string().into(),
                            rbs::value(password_hash)?,
                        );
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert(
                            "display_name".to_string().into(),
                            rbs::value(display_name)?,
                        );
                    rb_arg_map.insert("email".to_string().into(), rbs::value(email)?);
                    rb_arg_map.insert("phone".to_string().into(), rbs::value(phone)?);
                    rb_arg_map.insert("avatar".to_string().into(), rbs::value(avatar)?);
                    rb_arg_map.insert("status".to_string().into(), rbs::value(status)?);
                    {}
                    use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                    let driver_type = rb.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                    use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                    pub fn do_py_sql(
                        mut arg: rbs::Value,
                        _tag: char,
                    ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                        use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                        let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["username"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(
                            rbs::value({ &arg["password_hash"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                        );
                        args.push(
                            rbs::value({ &arg["display_name"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                        );
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["email"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["phone"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["avatar"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["status"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            "INSERT INTO auth_admin_users (username, password_hash, display_name, email, phone, avatar, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
                        );
                        (sql, args)
                    }
                    let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map), '?');
                    use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                    rb.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                }

                pub async fn list(
                    rb: &dyn Executor,
                    keyword: &str,
                    status: Option<i8>,
                ) -> rbatis::Result<Vec<AdminUser>> {
                    let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                        2usize,
                    );
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert("keyword".to_string().into(), rbs::value(keyword)?);
                    rb_arg_map.insert("status".to_string().into(), rbs::value(status)?);
                    {}
                    use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                    let driver_type = rb.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                    use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                    pub fn do_py_sql(
                        mut arg: rbs::Value,
                        _tag: char,
                    ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                        use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                        let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            "SELECT * FROM auth_admin_users WHERE 1=1",
                        );
                        if {
                            bool::op_from((&arg["keyword"]).op_ne(&rbs::Value::Null))
                                && bool::op_from((&arg["keyword"]).op_ne(&""))
                        }
                            .to_owned()
                            .into()
                        {
                            args.push(
                                rbs::value({ &arg["keyword"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                            );
                            args.push(
                                rbs::value({ &arg["keyword"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                            );
                            args.push(
                                rbs::value({ &arg["keyword"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                            );
                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                &mut sql,
                                " AND (username LIKE concat('%',?,'%') OR display_name LIKE concat('%',?,'%') OR email LIKE concat('%',?,'%'))",
                            );
                        }
                        if { (&arg["status"]).op_ne(&rbs::Value::Null) }
                            .to_owned()
                            .into()
                        {
                            args.push(
                                rbs::value({ &arg["status"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                            );
                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                &mut sql,
                                " AND status = ?",
                            );
                        }
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            " ORDER BY id DESC",
                        );
                        (sql, args)
                    }
                    let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map), '?');
                    use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                    let r = rb.query(&sql, rb_args).await?;
                    rbatis::decode::decode(r)
                }
                pub async fn count(
                    rb: &dyn Executor,
                    keyword: &str,
                    status: Option<i8>,
                ) -> rbatis::Result<u64> {
                    let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                        2usize,
                    );
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert("keyword".to_string().into(), rbs::value(keyword)?);
                    rb_arg_map.insert("status".to_string().into(), rbs::value(status)?);
                    {}
                    use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                    let driver_type = rb.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                    use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                    pub fn do_py_sql(
                        mut arg: rbs::Value,
                        _tag: char,
                    ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                        use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                        let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            "SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM auth_admin_users WHERE 1=1",
                        );
                        if {
                            bool::op_from((&arg["keyword"]).op_ne(&rbs::Value::Null))
                                && bool::op_from((&arg["keyword"]).op_ne(&""))
                        }
                            .to_owned()
                            .into()
                        {
                            args.push(
                                rbs::value({ &arg["keyword"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                            );
                            args.push(
                                rbs::value({ &arg["keyword"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                            );
                            args.push(
                                rbs::value({ &arg["keyword"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                            );
                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                &mut sql,
                                " AND (username LIKE concat('%',?,'%') OR display_name LIKE concat('%',?,'%') OR email LIKE concat('%',?,'%'))",
                            );
                        }
                        if { (&arg["status"]).op_ne(&rbs::Value::Null) }
                            .to_owned()
                            .into()
                        {
                            args.push(
                                rbs::value({ &arg["status"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                            );
                            rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                &mut sql,
                                " AND status = ?",
                            );
                        }
                        (sql, args)
                    }
                    let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map), '?');
                    use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                    let r = rb.query(&sql, rb_args).await?;
                    rbatis::decode::decode(r)
                }
                pub async fn update_by_id(
                    rb: &dyn Executor,
                    id: &i64,
                    username: &str,
                    display_name: &str,
                    email: &str,
                    phone: &str,
                    status: &i8,
                ) -> rbatis::Result<ExecResult> {
                    let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                        6usize,
                    );
                    rb_arg_map.insert("id".to_string().into(), rbs::value(id)?);
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert("username".to_string().into(), rbs::value(username)?);
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert(
                            "display_name".to_string().into(),
                            rbs::value(display_name)?,
                        );
                    rb_arg_map.insert("email".to_string().into(), rbs::value(email)?);
                    rb_arg_map.insert("phone".to_string().into(), rbs::value(phone)?);
                    rb_arg_map.insert("status".to_string().into(), rbs::value(status)?);
                    {}
                    use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                    let driver_type = rb.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                    use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                    pub fn do_py_sql(
                        mut arg: rbs::Value,
                        _tag: char,
                    ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                        use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                        let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["username"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(
                            rbs::value({ &arg["display_name"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                        );
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["email"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["phone"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["status"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["id"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            "UPDATE auth_admin_users SET username=?, display_name=?, email=?, phone=?, status=? WHERE id=?",
                        );
                        (sql, args)
                    }
                    let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map), '?');
                    use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                    rb.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                }

                pub async fn batch_delete(
                    rb: &dyn Executor,
                    ids: &[i64],
                ) -> rbatis::Result<ExecResult> {
                    let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                        1usize,
                    );
                    rb_arg_map.insert("ids".to_string().into(), rbs::value(ids)?);
                    {}
                    use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                    let driver_type = rb.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                    use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                    pub fn do_py_sql(
                        mut arg: rbs::Value,
                        _tag: char,
                    ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                        use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                        let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            "DELETE FROM auth_admin_users WHERE id IN (",
                        );
                        sql.push_str(
                            &{
                                let mut sql = String::with_capacity(282usize);
                                for (ref index, item) in { &arg["ids"] } {
                                    args.push(rbs::value({ item }).unwrap_or_default());
                                    rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                                        &mut sql,
                                        "?,",
                                    );
                                }
                                sql = sql
                                    .trim_start_matches(",")
                                    .trim_end_matches(",")
                                    .to_string();
                                sql
                            },
                        );
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(&mut sql, ")");
                        (sql, args)
                    }
                    let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map), '?');
                    use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                    rb.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                }
                pub async fn update_password(
                    rb: &dyn Executor,
                    id: &i64,
                    password_hash: &str,
                ) -> rbatis::Result<ExecResult> {
                    let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                        2usize,
                    );

                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert(
                            "password_hash".to_string().into(),
                            rbs::value(password_hash)?,
                        );
                    {}
                    use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                    let driver_type = rb.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                    use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                    pub fn do_py_sql(
                        mut arg: rbs::Value,
                        _tag: char,
                    ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                        use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;

                        let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                        args.push(
                            rbs::value({ &arg["password_hash"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                        );
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["id"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            "UPDATE auth_admin_users SET password_hash=? WHERE id=?",
                        );
                        (sql, args)
                    }
                    let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map), '?');
                    use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                    rb.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                }

            impl UserRole {
                pub async fn assign(
                    rb: &dyn Executor,
                    user_id: &i64,
                    role_id: &i64,
                ) -> rbatis::Result<ExecResult> {
                    let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                        2usize,
                    );
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert("user_id".to_string().into(), rbs::value(user_id)?);
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert("role_id".to_string().into(), rbs::value(role_id)?);
                    {}
                    use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                    let driver_type = rb.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                    use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                    pub fn do_py_sql(
                        mut arg: rbs::Value,
                        _tag: char,
                    ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                        use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                        let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["user_id"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["role_id"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            "INSERT IGNORE INTO auth_admin_user_roles (user_id, role_id) VALUES (?, ?)",
                        );
                        (sql, args)
                    }
                    let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map), '?');
                    use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                    rb.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                }

                        _tag: char,
                    ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                        use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                        let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["role_id"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            "SELECT p.* FROM auth_admin_permissions p INNER JOIN auth_admin_role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = ?",
                        );
                        (sql, args)
                    }
                    let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map), '?');
                    use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                    let r = rb.query(&sql, rb_args).await?;
                    rbatis::decode::decode(r)
                }
                pub async fn list_by_user(
                    rb: &dyn Executor,
                    user_id: &i64,
                ) -> rbatis::Result<Vec<AdminPermission>> {
                    let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                        1usize,
                    );
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert("user_id".to_string().into(), rbs::value(user_id)?);
                    {}
                    use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                    let driver_type = rb.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                    use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                    pub fn do_py_sql(
                        mut arg: rbs::Value,
                        _tag: char,
                    ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                        use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                        let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["user_id"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            "SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM auth_admin_permissions p INNER JOIN auth_admin_role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN auth_admin_user_roles ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = ?",
                        );
                        (sql, args)
                    }
                    let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map), '?');
                    use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                    let r = rb.query(&sql, rb_args).await?;
                    rbatis::decode::decode(r)
                }
            }
        }

                pub async fn insert_permission(
                    rb: &dyn Executor,
                    name: &str,
                    resource: &str,
                    action: &str,
                    description: &str,
                    status: &i8,
                ) -> rbatis::Result<ExecResult> {
                    let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                        5usize,
                    );
                    rb_arg_map.insert("name".to_string().into(), rbs::value(name)?);
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert("resource".to_string().into(), rbs::value(resource)?);
                    rb_arg_map.insert("action".to_string().into(), rbs::value(action)?);
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert(
                            "description".to_string().into(),
                            rbs::value(description)?,
                        );
                    rb_arg_map.insert("status".to_string().into(), rbs::value(status)?);
                    {}
                    use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                    let driver_type = rb.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                    use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                    pub fn do_py_sql(
                        mut arg: rbs::Value,
                        _tag: char,
                    ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                        use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                        let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["name"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["resource"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["action"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(
                            rbs::value({ &arg["description"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                        );
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["status"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            "INSERT INTO auth_admin_permissions (name, resource, action, description, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
                        );
                        (sql, args)
                    }
                    let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map), '?');
                    use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                    rb.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                }
                pub async fn update_by_id(
                    rb: &dyn Executor,
                    id: &i64,
                    name: &str,
                    resource: &str,
                    action: &str,
                    description: &str,
                    status: &i8,
                ) -> rbatis::Result<ExecResult> {
                    let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                        6usize,
                    );
                    rb_arg_map.insert("id".to_string().into(), rbs::value(id)?);
                    rb_arg_map.insert("name".to_string().into(), rbs::value(name)?);
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert("resource".to_string().into(), rbs::value(resource)?);
                    rb_arg_map.insert("action".to_string().into(), rbs::value(action)?);
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert(
                            "description".to_string().into(),
                            rbs::value(description)?,
                        );
                    rb_arg_map.insert("status".to_string().into(), rbs::value(status)?);
                    {}
                    use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                    let driver_type = rb.rb_ref().driver_type()?;
                    use rbatis::rbatis_codegen;
                    pub fn do_py_sql(
                        mut arg: rbs::Value,
                        _tag: char,
                    ) -> (String, Vec<rbs::Value>) {
                        use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;

                        let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["name"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["resource"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["action"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(
                            rbs::value({ &arg["description"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                        );
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["status"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["id"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            "UPDATE auth_admin_permissions SET name=?, resource=?, action=?, description=?, status=? WHERE id=?",

                    let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map), '?');
                    use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                    rb.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                }

                pub async fn move_dept(
                    rb: &dyn Executor,
                    id: &i64,
                    new_parent_id: &i64,
                ) -> rbatis::Result<ExecResult> {
                    let mut rb_arg_map = rbs::value::map::ValueMap::with_capacity(
                        2usize,
                    );
                    rb_arg_map.insert("id".to_string().into(), rbs::value(id)?);
                    rb_arg_map
                        .insert(
                            "new_parent_id".to_string().into(),
                            rbs::value(new_parent_id)?,
                        );
                    {}
                    use rbatis::executor::RBatisRef;
                    let driver_type = rb.rb_ref().driver_type()?;

                        mut arg: rbs::Value,
                        _tag: char,

                        use rbatis_codegen::ops::*;
                        let mut sql = String::with_capacity(1024usize);
                        let mut args = Vec::with_capacity(10usize);
                        args.push(
                            rbs::value({ &arg["new_parent_id"] }).unwrap_or_default(),
                        );
                        args.push(rbs::value({ &arg["id"] }).unwrap_or_default());
                        rbatis_codegen::codegen::string_util::concat_str(
                            &mut sql,
                            "UPDATE auth_admin_departments SET parent_id=? WHERE id=?",
                        );
                        (sql, args)
                    }
                    let (mut sql, rb_args) = do_py_sql(rbs::Value::Map(rb_arg_map), '?');
                    use rbatis::executor::Executor;
                    rb.exec(&sql, rb_args).await
                }
            }
