                    );
                }
                if !status_codes.is_empty() {
                    let responses = std::ops::DerefMut::deref_mut(
                        &mut operation.responses,
                    );
                    responses
                        .retain(|k, _| {
                            if let Ok(code) = <salvo::http::StatusCode as std::str::FromStr>::from_str(
                                k,
                            ) {
                                status_codes.contains(&code)
                            } else {
                                true
                            }
                        });
                }
                salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                    operation,
                    components,
                }
            }
            #[allow(non_upper_case_globals)]
            const _: () = {
                static __INVENTORY: ::inventory::Node = ::inventory::Node {
                    value: &{
                        salvo::oapi::EndpointRegistry::save(
                            __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_type_id_get_me,
                            __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_get_me,
                        )
                    },
                    next: ::inventory::core::cell::UnsafeCell::new(
                        ::inventory::core::option::Option::None,
                    ),
                };
                unsafe extern "C" fn __ctor() {
                    unsafe {
                        ::inventory::ErasedNode::submit(__INVENTORY.value, &__INVENTORY)
                    }
                }
                #[used]
                #[link_section = ".CRT$XCU"]
                static __CTOR: unsafe extern "C" fn() = __ctor;
            };
            /// PUT /auth-admin/me/password — 修改当前用户密码
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct change_password;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for change_password {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "change_password")
                }
            }
            impl change_password {
                /// PUT /auth-admin/me/password — 修改当前用户密码
                async fn change_password(
                    body: JsonBody<ChangePasswordRequest>,
                    req: &mut Request,
                    depot: &mut Depot,
                    res: &mut Response,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        let config = match depot.obtain::<Arc<LocalAuthConfig>>() {
                            Ok(c) => c,
                            Err(_) => {
                                res.status_code(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR);
                                return Json(
                                    RespVO::from_error_info("-1", "认证配置错误"),
                                );
                            }
                        };
                        let token = req
                            .headers()
                            .get("Authorization")
                            .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())
                            .unwrap_or("");
                        let claims = match verify_token(token, &config.secret) {
                            Ok(c) => c,
                            Err(e) => {
                                res.status_code(StatusCode::UNAUTHORIZED);
                                return Json(
                                    RespVO::from_error_info(
                                        "-1",
                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(format_args!("令牌无效: {0}", e))
                                        }),
                                    ),
                                );
                            }
                        };
                        let uid = match claims.uid {
                            Some(uid) => uid,
                            None => {
                                return Json(
                                    RespVO::from_error_info("-1", "令牌中无用户ID"),
                                );
                            }
                        };
                        let pwd_req = body.into_inner();
                        match AuthService::change_password(uid, &pwd_req).await {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for change_password {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,
                    clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,
                    clippy::type_complexity,
                    clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                    clippy::used_underscore_binding
                )]
                fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(
                    &'life0 self,
                    __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                    __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,
                    __macro_gen_res: &'life3 mut salvo::Response,
                    __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
                ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                    Box<
                        dyn ::core::future::Future<
                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >
                where
                    'life0: 'async_trait,
                    'life1: 'async_trait,
                    'life2: 'async_trait,
                    'life3: 'async_trait,
                    'life4: 'async_trait,
                    Self: 'async_trait,
                {
                    Box::pin(async move {
                        let __self = self;
                        let _: () = {
                            let body: JsonBody<ChangePasswordRequest> = match <JsonBody<
                                ChangePasswordRequest,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "body",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            salvo::Writer::write(
                                    Self::change_password(
                                            body,
                                            __macro_gen_req,
                                            __macro_gen_depot,
                                            __macro_gen_res,
                                        )
                                        .await,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await;
                        };
                    })
                }
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_type_id_change_password() -> ::std::any::TypeId {
                ::std::any::TypeId::of::<change_password>()
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_change_password() -> salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                let mut components = salvo::oapi::Components::new();
                let status_codes: &[salvo::http::StatusCode] = &[];
                let mut operation = salvo::oapi::Operation::new();
                {
                    let mut components = &mut components;
                    let mut operation = &mut operation;
                    <JsonBody<
                        ChangePasswordRequest,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointArgRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                        "body",
                    );
                    <Json<
                        RespVO<()>,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointOutRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                    );
                    operation.tags.push(("auth").into());
                    operation.summary = Some("修改当前用户密码".into());
                }
                if operation.operation_id.is_none() {
                    operation.operation_id = Some(
                        salvo::oapi::naming::assign_name::<
                            change_password,
                        >(salvo::oapi::naming::NameRule::Auto),
                    );
                }
                if !status_codes.is_empty() {
                    let responses = std::ops::DerefMut::deref_mut(
                        &mut operation.responses,
                    );
                    responses
                        .retain(|k, _| {
                            if let Ok(code) = <salvo::http::StatusCode as std::str::FromStr>::from_str(
                                k,
                            ) {
                                status_codes.contains(&code)
                            } else {
                                true
                            }
                        });
                }
                salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                    operation,
                    components,
                }
            }
            #[allow(non_upper_case_globals)]
            const _: () = {
                static __INVENTORY: ::inventory::Node = ::inventory::Node {
                    value: &{
                        salvo::oapi::EndpointRegistry::save(
                            __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_type_id_change_password,
                            __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_change_password,
                        )
                    },
                    next: ::inventory::core::cell::UnsafeCell::new(
                        ::inventory::core::option::Option::None,
                    ),
                };
                unsafe extern "C" fn __ctor() {
                    unsafe {
                        ::inventory::ErasedNode::submit(__INVENTORY.value, &__INVENTORY)
                    }
                }
                #[used]
                #[link_section = ".CRT$XCU"]
                static __CTOR: unsafe extern "C" fn() = __ctor;
            };
            /// POST /auth-admin/refresh — 刷新 Token
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct refresh_token;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for refresh_token {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "refresh_token")
                }
            }
            impl refresh_token {
                /// POST /auth-admin/refresh — 刷新 Token
                async fn refresh_token(
                    req: &mut Request,
                    depot: &mut Depot,
                    res: &mut Response,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<serde_json::Value>> {
                    {
                        let config = match depot.obtain::<Arc<LocalAuthConfig>>() {
                            Ok(c) => c,
                            Err(_) => {
                                return Json(
                                    RespVO::from_error_info("-1", "认证配置错误"),
                                );
                            }
                        };
                        let token = req
                            .headers()
                            .get("Authorization")
                            .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())
                            .unwrap_or("");
                        let claims = match verify_token(token, &config.secret) {
                            Ok(c) => c,
                            Err(e) => {
                                res.status_code(StatusCode::UNAUTHORIZED);
                                return Json(
                                    RespVO::from_error_info(
                                        "-1",
                                        &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                            ::alloc::fmt::format(format_args!("令牌无效: {0}", e))
                                        }),
                                    ),
                                );
                            }
                        };
                        match AuthService::refresh_token(
                                &claims,
                                &config.secret,
                                config.expires_in_secs,
                            )
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(data) => Json(RespVO::from(&data)),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for refresh_token {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,
                    clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,
                    clippy::type_complexity,
                    clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                    clippy::used_underscore_binding
                )]
                fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(

                    __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                    __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,

                    __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
                ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                    Box<
                        dyn ::core::future::Future<
                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >
                where
                    'life0: 'async_trait,
                    'life1: 'async_trait,
                    'life2: 'async_trait,
                    'life3: 'async_trait,
                    'life4: 'async_trait,
                    Self: 'async_trait,
                {
                    Box::pin(async move {
                        let __self = self;

                            salvo::Writer::write(
                                    Self::refresh_token(
                                            __macro_gen_req,
                                            __macro_gen_depot,
                                            __macro_gen_res,
                                        )
                                        .await,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await;
                        };
                    })
                }

            #[automatically_derived]

                }

            impl list_users {
                /// GET /auth-admin/users — 分页用户列表
                async fn list_users(
                    page: QueryParam<u64, false>,
                    size: QueryParam<u64, false>,
                    keyword: QueryParam<String, false>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<serde_json::Value>> {
                    {
                        let query = PageQuery {
                            page: page.into_inner(),
                            size: size.into_inner(),
                            keyword: keyword.into_inner(),
                        };
                        match UserAppService::list(&query).await {
                            Ok(data) => Json(RespVO::from(&data)),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

                /// POST /auth-admin/users — 创建用户
                async fn create_user(
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<serde_json::Value>> {
                    {
                        let input = body.into_inner();
                        match UserAppService::create(&input).await {
                            Ok(data) => Json(RespVO::from(&data)),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

                                serde_json::Value,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "body",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            salvo::Writer::write(
                                    Self::create_user(body).await,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await;
                        };
                    })
                }

                }

                /// PUT /auth-admin/users/{id} — 更新用户
                async fn update_user(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        match UserAppService::update(id.into_inner(), &body.into_inner())
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            /// POST /auth-admin/users/batch-delete — 批量删除
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct batch_delete_users;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for batch_delete_users {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "batch_delete_users")
                }
            }
            impl batch_delete_users {
                /// POST /auth-admin/users/batch-delete — 批量删除
                async fn batch_delete_users(
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        let input = body.into_inner();
                        let ids: Vec<i64> = match input["ids"].as_array() {
                            Some(arr) => arr.iter().filter_map(|v| v.as_i64()).collect(),
                            None => {
                                return Json(
                                    RespVO::from_error_info("-1", "缺少ids参数"),
                                );
                            }
                        };
                        match UserAppService::batch_delete(&ids).await {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for batch_delete_users {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,
                    clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,
                    clippy::type_complexity,
                    clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                    clippy::used_underscore_binding
                )]
                fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(
                    &'life0 self,
                    __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                    __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,
                    __macro_gen_res: &'life3 mut salvo::Response,
                    __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
                ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                    Box<
                        dyn ::core::future::Future<
                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >
                where
                    'life0: 'async_trait,
                    'life1: 'async_trait,
                    'life2: 'async_trait,
                    'life3: 'async_trait,
                    'life4: 'async_trait,
                    Self: 'async_trait,
                {
                    Box::pin(async move {
                        let __self = self;
                        let _: () = {

                                serde_json::Value,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "body",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };

                                    Self::batch_delete_users(body).await,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await;
                        };

                            } else {
                                true
                            }

            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct update_status;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for update_status {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "update_status")
                }
            }
            impl update_status {
                /// PUT /auth-admin/users/{id}/status — 启用/禁用
                async fn update_status(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        let input = body.into_inner();
                        let status: i8 = input["status"].as_i64().unwrap_or(1) as i8;
                        match UserAppService::update_status(id.into_inner(), status)
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]

                }

            impl reset_password {
                /// PUT /auth-admin/users/{id}/reset-password — 重置密码
                async fn reset_password(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        let input = body.into_inner();
                        let new_password = input["password"]
                            .as_str()
                            .unwrap_or("123456");
                        match UserAppService::reset_password(
                                id.into_inner(),
                                new_password,
                            )
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            /// POST /auth-admin/users/{id}/roles — 分配角色
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct assign_user_role;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for assign_user_role {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "assign_user_role")
                }
            }
            impl assign_user_role {
                /// POST /auth-admin/users/{id}/roles — 分配角色
                async fn assign_user_role(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        let input = body.into_inner();
                        let role_id: i64 = match input["role_id"].as_i64() {
                            Some(id) => id,
                            None => {
                                return Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", "缺少role_id"));
                            }
                        };
                        match UserAppService::assign_role(id.into_inner(), role_id).await
                        {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for assign_user_role {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,
                    clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,
                    clippy::type_complexity,
                    clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                    clippy::used_underscore_binding
                )]
                fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(
                    &'life0 self,
                    __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                    __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,
                    __macro_gen_res: &'life3 mut salvo::Response,
                    __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
                ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                    Box<
                        dyn ::core::future::Future<
                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >
                where
                    'life0: 'async_trait,
                    'life1: 'async_trait,
                    'life2: 'async_trait,
                    'life3: 'async_trait,
                    'life4: 'async_trait,
                    Self: 'async_trait,
                {
                    Box::pin(async move {
                        let __self = self;
                        let _: () = {
                            let id: PathParam<i64> = match <PathParam<
                                i64,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "id",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            let body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value> = match <JsonBody<
                                serde_json::Value,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "body",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            salvo::Writer::write(
                                    Self::assign_user_role(id, body).await,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await;
                        };
                    })
                }
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_type_id_assign_user_role() -> ::std::any::TypeId {
                ::std::any::TypeId::of::<assign_user_role>()
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_assign_user_role() -> salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                let mut components = salvo::oapi::Components::new();
                let status_codes: &[salvo::http::StatusCode] = &[];
                let mut operation = salvo::oapi::Operation::new();
                {
                    let mut components = &mut components;
                    let mut operation = &mut operation;
                    <PathParam<
                        i64,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointArgRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                        "id",
                    );
                    <JsonBody<
                        serde_json::Value,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointArgRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                        "body",
                    );
                    <Json<
                        RespVO<()>,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointOutRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                    );
                    operation.tags.push(("users").into());
                    operation.summary = Some("分配用户角色".into());
                }
                if operation.operation_id.is_none() {
                    operation.operation_id = Some(
                        salvo::oapi::naming::assign_name::<
                            assign_user_role,
                        >(salvo::oapi::naming::NameRule::Auto),
                    );
                }
                if !status_codes.is_empty() {
                    let responses = std::ops::DerefMut::deref_mut(
                        &mut operation.responses,
                    );
                    responses
                        .retain(|k, _| {
                            if let Ok(code) = <salvo::http::StatusCode as std::str::FromStr>::from_str(
                                k,
                            ) {
                                status_codes.contains(&code)
                            } else {
                                true
                            }
                        });
                }
                salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                    operation,
                    components,
                }
            }

            /// DELETE /auth-admin/users/{id}/roles/{role_id} — 移除角色
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct revoke_user_role;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]

                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "revoke_user_role")
                }

            impl revoke_user_role {
                /// DELETE /auth-admin/users/{id}/roles/{role_id} — 移除角色
                async fn revoke_user_role(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    role_id: PathParam<i64>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        match UserAppService::revoke_role(
                                id.into_inner(),
                                role_id.into_inner(),
                            )
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            /// GET /auth-admin/users/{id}/permissions — 用户有效权限（合并所有角色）

            pub struct get_user_permissions;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]

                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "get_user_permissions")
                }
            }
            impl get_user_permissions {
                /// GET /auth-admin/users/{id}/permissions — 用户有效权限（合并所有角色）
                async fn get_user_permissions(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<Vec<AdminPermission>>> {
                    {
                        match UserAppService::get_user_permissions(id.into_inner()).await
                        {
                            Ok(perms) => Json(RespVO::from(&perms)),
                            Err(msg) => {
                                Json(
                                    RespVO::<Vec<AdminPermission>>::from_error_info("-1", &msg),
                                )
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),

                    }

                async fn update_role(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        match RoleAppService::update(id.into_inner(), &body.into_inner())
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }

            impl get_role_users {
                /// GET /auth-admin/roles/{id}/users — 角色下用户列表
                async fn get_role_users(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<Vec<AdminUser>>> {
                    {
                        match RoleAppService::get_role_users(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(users) => Json(RespVO::from(&users)),
                            Err(msg) => {
                                Json(RespVO::<Vec<AdminUser>>::from_error_info("-1", &msg))
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            /// POST /auth-admin/roles/{id}/permissions — 授予权限
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct assign_role_permission;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for assign_role_permission {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "assign_role_permission")
                }
            }
            impl assign_role_permission {
                /// POST /auth-admin/roles/{id}/permissions — 授予权限
                async fn assign_role_permission(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        let input = body.into_inner();
                        let perm_id: i64 = match input["permission_id"].as_i64() {
                            Some(id) => id,
                            None => {
                                return Json(
                                    RespVO::from_error_info("-1", "缺少permission_id"),
                                );
                            }
                        };
                        match RoleAppService::assign_permission(id.into_inner(), perm_id)
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for assign_role_permission {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,
                    clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,
                    clippy::type_complexity,
                    clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,

                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >
                where
                    'life0: 'async_trait,
                    'life1: 'async_trait,
                    'life2: 'async_trait,
                    'life3: 'async_trait,

                                        .status_code

                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            let body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value> = match <JsonBody<
                                serde_json::Value,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "body",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }

                async fn revoke_role_permission(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    perm_id: PathParam<i64>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        match RoleAppService::revoke_permission(
                                id.into_inner(),
                                perm_id.into_inner(),
                            )
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }

                    operation.tags.push(("roles").into());
                    operation.summary = Some("撤销角色权限".into());
                }
                if operation.operation_id.is_none() {
                    operation.operation_id = Some(
                        salvo::oapi::naming::assign_name::<
                            revoke_role_permission,
                        >(salvo::oapi::naming::NameRule::Auto),
                    );
                }
                if !status_codes.is_empty() {
                    let responses = std::ops::DerefMut::deref_mut(
                        &mut operation.responses,
                    );
                    responses
                        .retain(|k, _| {
                            if let Ok(code) = <salvo::http::StatusCode as std::str::FromStr>::from_str(
                                k,
                            ) {
                                status_codes.contains(&code)
                            } else {
                                true
                            }
                        });
                }
                salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                    operation,
                    components,
                }
            }

        pub mod permission_handler {
            //! 权限管理 Handler — CRUD
            use salvo::prelude::*;
            use salvo::oapi::extract::*;
            use genies::core::RespVO;
            use crate::application::service::PermissionAppService;
            use crate::domain::entity::AdminPermission;
            /// GET /auth-admin/permissions — 权限列表
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct list_permissions;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for list_permissions {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "list_permissions")
                }
            }
            impl list_permissions {
                /// GET /auth-admin/permissions — 权限列表
                async fn list_permissions() -> Json<RespVO<Vec<AdminPermission>>> {
                    {
                        match PermissionAppService::list_all().await {
                            Ok(perms) => Json(RespVO::from(&perms)),
                            Err(msg) => {
                                Json(
                                    RespVO::<Vec<AdminPermission>>::from_error_info("-1", &msg),
                                )
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for list_permissions {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,
                    clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,
                    clippy::type_complexity,
                    clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                    clippy::used_underscore_binding
                )]
                fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(
                    &'life0 self,
                    __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                    __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,
                    __macro_gen_res: &'life3 mut salvo::Response,
                    __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
                ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                    Box<
                        dyn ::core::future::Future<
                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >

                    'life0: 'async_trait,
                    'life1: 'async_trait,
                    'life2: 'async_trait,
                    'life3: 'async_trait,
                    'life4: 'async_trait,
                    Self: 'async_trait,
                {
                    Box::pin(async move {
                        let __self = self;
                        let _: () = {
                            salvo::Writer::write(
                                    Self::list_permissions().await,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await;
                        };
                    })
                }
            }

                ::std::any::TypeId::of::<list_permissions>()

            /// POST /auth-admin/permissions — 创建权限
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct create_permission;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for create_permission {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "create_permission")
                }
            }
            impl create_permission {
                /// POST /auth-admin/permissions — 创建权限
                async fn create_permission(
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        let input = body.into_inner();
                        match PermissionAppService::create(&input).await {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            /// GET /auth-admin/permissions/{id} — 权限详情
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct get_permission;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for get_permission {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "get_permission")
                }
            }
            impl get_permission {
                /// GET /auth-admin/permissions/{id} — 权限详情
                async fn get_permission(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<AdminPermission>> {
                    {
                        match PermissionAppService::get_by_id(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(perm) => Json(RespVO::from(&perm)),
                            Err(msg) => {
                                Json(RespVO::<AdminPermission>::from_error_info("-1", &msg))
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            /// PUT /auth-admin/permissions/{id} — 更新权限
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct update_permission;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for update_permission {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "update_permission")
                }
            }
            impl update_permission {
                /// PUT /auth-admin/permissions/{id} — 更新权限
                async fn update_permission(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        match PermissionAppService::update(
                                id.into_inner(),
                                &body.into_inner(),
                            )
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

                                    __macro_gen_req,

                                    }

                                serde_json::Value,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "body",
                                )

                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;

                /// DELETE /auth-admin/permissions/{id} — 删除权限
                async fn delete_permission(id: PathParam<i64>) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        match PermissionAppService::delete(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }

                    &'life0 self,

                    __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,

                    __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,

                        dyn ::core::future::Future<
                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >
                where

                    'life2: 'async_trait,

                    'life4: 'async_trait,

                        let __self = self;
                        let _: () = {
                            let id: PathParam<i64> = match <PathParam<
                                i64,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "id",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            salvo::Writer::write(
                                    Self::delete_permission(id).await,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await;
                        };
                    })
                }
            }

                async fn list_departments() -> Json<RespVO<Vec<AdminDepartment>>> {
                    {
                        match DepartmentAppService::list_all().await {
                            Ok(depts) => Json(RespVO::from(&depts)),
                            Err(msg) => {
                                Json(
                                    RespVO::<Vec<AdminDepartment>>::from_error_info("-1", &msg),
                                )
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<AdminDepartment>> {
                    {
                        match DepartmentAppService::get_by_id(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(dept) => Json(RespVO::from(&dept)),
                            Err(msg) => {
                                Json(RespVO::<AdminDepartment>::from_error_info("-1", &msg))
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

            /// PUT /auth-admin/departments/{id} — 更新部门
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct update_department;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for update_department {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "update_department")
                }
            }
            impl update_department {
                /// PUT /auth-admin/departments/{id} — 更新部门
                async fn update_department(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        match DepartmentAppService::update(
                                id.into_inner(),
                                &body.into_inner(),
                            )
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for update_department {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,
                    clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,
                    clippy::type_complexity,
                    clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                    clippy::used_underscore_binding
                )]
                fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(
                    &'life0 self,
                    __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                    __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,
                    __macro_gen_res: &'life3 mut salvo::Response,
                    __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
                ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                    Box<
                        dyn ::core::future::Future<
                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >
                where
                    'life0: 'async_trait,
                    'life1: 'async_trait,
                    'life2: 'async_trait,
                    'life3: 'async_trait,
                    'life4: 'async_trait,
                    Self: 'async_trait,
                {
                    Box::pin(async move {
                        let __self = self;
                        let _: () = {
                            let id: PathParam<i64> = match <PathParam<
                                i64,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "id",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            let body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value> = match <JsonBody<
                                serde_json::Value,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "body",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            salvo::Writer::write(
                                    Self::update_department(id, body).await,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await;
                        };
                    })
                }
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_type_id_update_department() -> ::std::any::TypeId {
                ::std::any::TypeId::of::<update_department>()
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_update_department() -> salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                let mut components = salvo::oapi::Components::new();
                let status_codes: &[salvo::http::StatusCode] = &[];
                let mut operation = salvo::oapi::Operation::new();
                {
                    let mut components = &mut components;
                    let mut operation = &mut operation;
                    <PathParam<
                        i64,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointArgRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                        "id",
                    );
                    <JsonBody<
                        serde_json::Value,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointArgRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                        "body",
                    );
                    <Json<
                        RespVO<()>,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointOutRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                    );
                    operation.tags.push(("departments").into());
                    operation.summary = Some("更新部门".into());
                }
                if operation.operation_id.is_none() {
                    operation.operation_id = Some(
                        salvo::oapi::naming::assign_name::<
                            update_department,
                        >(salvo::oapi::naming::NameRule::Auto),
                    );
                }
                if !status_codes.is_empty() {
                    let responses = std::ops::DerefMut::deref_mut(
                        &mut operation.responses,
                    );
                    responses
                        .retain(|k, _| {
                            if let Ok(code) = <salvo::http::StatusCode as std::str::FromStr>::from_str(
                                k,
                            ) {
                                status_codes.contains(&code)
                            } else {
                                true
                            }
                        });
                }
                salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                    operation,
                    components,
                }
            }
            #[allow(non_upper_case_globals)]
            const _: () = {
                static __INVENTORY: ::inventory::Node = ::inventory::Node {
                    value: &{
                        salvo::oapi::EndpointRegistry::save(
                            __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_type_id_update_department,
                            __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_update_department,
                        )

                    next: ::inventory::core::cell::UnsafeCell::new(
                        ::inventory::core::option::Option::None,

                };

                /// DELETE /auth-admin/departments/{id} — 删除部门
                async fn delete_department(id: PathParam<i64>) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        match DepartmentAppService::delete(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }

            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]

            impl move_department {
                /// PUT /auth-admin/departments/{id}/move/{parent_id} — 移动部门
                async fn move_department(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    parent_id: PathParam<i64>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        match DepartmentAppService::move_dept(
                                id.into_inner(),
                                parent_id.into_inner(),
                            )
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

        pub mod application_handler {
            //! 应用管理 Handler — CRUD
            use std::sync::Arc;
            use salvo::prelude::*;
            use salvo::oapi::extract::*;
            use genies::core::RespVO;
            use crate::application::app_service::ApplicationAppService;
            use crate::interfaces::dto::application_dto::{
                ApplicationVO, CreateApplicationRequest, UpdateApplicationRequest,
            };
            /// 从 Depot 中获取 casbin enforcer 和 subject，对 JSON Value 进行字段级权限过滤
            fn apply_casbin_filter(depot: &Depot, value: &mut serde_json::Value) {
                let enforcer = depot
                    .get::<Arc<casbin::Enforcer>>("casbin_enforcer")
                    .ok()
                    .cloned();
                let subject = depot.get::<String>("casbin_subject").ok().cloned();
                if let (Some(ref e), Some(ref s)) = (enforcer, subject) {
                    if let serde_json::Value::Object(map) = value {
                        if let Some(serde_json::Value::Array(arr)) = map.get_mut("list")
                        {
                            for item in arr.iter_mut() {
                                ApplicationVO::casbin_filter(item, e, s);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    if value.is_object() && value.get("list").is_none() {
                        ApplicationVO::casbin_filter(value, e, s);
                    }
                }
            }
            /// GET /auth-admin/apps — 分页应用列表
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct list_apps;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for list_apps {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "list_apps")
                }
            }
            impl list_apps {
                /// GET /auth-admin/apps — 分页应用列表
                async fn list_apps(
                    page: QueryParam<u64, false>,
                    size: QueryParam<u64, false>,
                    keyword: QueryParam<String, false>,
                    depot: &mut Depot,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<serde_json::Value>> {
                    {
                        let page = page.into_inner().unwrap_or(1);
                        let size = size.into_inner().unwrap_or(10);
                        let keyword = keyword.into_inner().unwrap_or_default();
                        match ApplicationAppService::list_apps(page, size, &keyword)
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(mut data) => {
                                apply_casbin_filter(depot, &mut data);
                                Json(RespVO::from(&data))
                            }
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for list_apps {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,
                    clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,
                    clippy::type_complexity,
                    clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                    clippy::used_underscore_binding
                )]
                fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(
                    &'life0 self,
                    __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                    __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,
                    __macro_gen_res: &'life3 mut salvo::Response,
                    __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
                ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                    Box<
                        dyn ::core::future::Future<
                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >
                where
                    'life0: 'async_trait,
                    'life1: 'async_trait,
                    'life2: 'async_trait,
                    'life3: 'async_trait,
                    'life4: 'async_trait,
                    Self: 'async_trait,
                {
                    Box::pin(async move {
                        let __self = self;
                        let _: () = {
                            let page: QueryParam<u64, false> = match <QueryParam<
                                u64,
                                false,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "page",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            let size: QueryParam<u64, false> = match <QueryParam<
                                u64,
                                false,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "size",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            let keyword: QueryParam<String, false> = match <QueryParam<
                                String,
                                false,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "keyword",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            salvo::Writer::write(
                                    Self::list_apps(page, size, keyword, __macro_gen_depot)
                                        .await,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await;
                        };
                    })
                }
            }
