                ::std::any::TypeId::of::<list_apps>()
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_list_apps() -> salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                let mut components = salvo::oapi::Components::new();
                let status_codes: &[salvo::http::StatusCode] = &[];
                let mut operation = salvo::oapi::Operation::new();
                {
                    let mut components = &mut components;
                    let mut operation = &mut operation;
                    <QueryParam<
                        u64,
                        false,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointArgRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                        "page",
                    );
                    <QueryParam<
                        u64,
                        false,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointArgRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                        "size",
                    );
                    <QueryParam<
                        String,
                        false,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointArgRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                        "keyword",
                    );
                    <Json<
                        RespVO<serde_json::Value>,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointOutRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                    );
                    operation.tags.push(("apps").into());
                    operation.summary = Some("分页应用列表".into());
                }
                if operation.operation_id.is_none() {
                    operation.operation_id = Some(
                        salvo::oapi::naming::assign_name::<
                            list_apps,
                        >(salvo::oapi::naming::NameRule::Auto),
                    );
                }
                if !status_codes.is_empty() {
                    let responses = std::ops::DerefMut::deref_mut(
                        &mut operation.responses,
                    );
                    responses
                        .retain(|k, _| {
                            if let Ok(code) = <salvo::http::StatusCode as std::str::FromStr>::from_str(
                                k,
                            ) {
                                status_codes.contains(&code)
                            } else {
                                true
                            }
                        });
                }
                salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                    operation,
                    components,
                }
            }
            #[allow(non_upper_case_globals)]
            const _: () = {
                static __INVENTORY: ::inventory::Node = ::inventory::Node {
                    value: &{
                        salvo::oapi::EndpointRegistry::save(
                            __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_type_id_list_apps,
                            __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_list_apps,
                        )
                    },
                    next: ::inventory::core::cell::UnsafeCell::new(
                        ::inventory::core::option::Option::None,
                    ),
                };
                unsafe extern "C" fn __ctor() {
                    unsafe {
                        ::inventory::ErasedNode::submit(__INVENTORY.value, &__INVENTORY)
                    }
                }
                #[used]
                #[link_section = ".CRT$XCU"]
                static __CTOR: unsafe extern "C" fn() = __ctor;
            };
            /// GET /auth-admin/apps/{id} — 应用详情
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct get_app;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for get_app {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "get_app")
                }
            }
            impl get_app {
                /// GET /auth-admin/apps/{id} — 应用详情
                async fn get_app(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    depot: &mut Depot,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<serde_json::Value>> {
                    {
                        match ApplicationAppService::get_app(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(app) => {
                                let vo: ApplicationVO = app.into();
                                let mut value = serde_json::to_value(vo)
                                    .unwrap_or_default();
                                apply_casbin_filter(depot, &mut value);
                                Json(RespVO::from(&value))
                            }
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            /// POST /auth-admin/apps — 创建应用
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct create_app;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for create_app {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "create_app")
                }
            }
            impl create_app {
                /// POST /auth-admin/apps — 创建应用
                async fn create_app(
                    body: JsonBody<CreateApplicationRequest>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<serde_json::Value>> {
                    {
                        let req = body.into_inner();
                        match ApplicationAppService::create_app(
                                &req.app_name,
                                req.display_name.as_deref().unwrap_or(""),
                                req.description.as_deref().unwrap_or(""),
                                &req.base_url,
                                req.status.unwrap_or(1),
                            )
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(data) => Json(RespVO::from(&data)),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for create_app {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,

                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,

                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,

            /// PUT /auth-admin/apps/{id} — 更新应用
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct update_app;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for update_app {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "update_app")
                }
            }
            impl update_app {
                /// PUT /auth-admin/apps/{id} — 更新应用
                async fn update_app(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    body: JsonBody<UpdateApplicationRequest>,
                ) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        let req = body.into_inner();
                        let app_id = id.into_inner();
                        let existing = match ApplicationAppService::get_app(app_id).await
                        {
                            Ok(a) => a,
                            Err(msg) => return Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        };
                        let app_name = req
                            .app_name
                            .unwrap_or_else(|| existing.app_name.unwrap_or_default());
                        let display_name = req
                            .display_name
                            .unwrap_or_else(|| {
                                existing.display_name.unwrap_or_default()
                            });
                        let description = req
                            .description
                            .unwrap_or_else(|| existing.description.unwrap_or_default());
                        let base_url = req
                            .base_url
                            .unwrap_or_else(|| existing.base_url.unwrap_or_default());
                        let status = req
                            .status
                            .unwrap_or_else(|| existing.status.unwrap_or(1));
                        match ApplicationAppService::update_app(
                                app_id,
                                &app_name,
                                &display_name,
                                &description,
                                &base_url,
                                status,
                            )
                            .await
                        {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for update_app {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,
                    clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,
                    clippy::type_complexity,
                    clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                    clippy::used_underscore_binding
                )]
                fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(
                    &'life0 self,
                    __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                    __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,
                    __macro_gen_res: &'life3 mut salvo::Response,
                    __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
                ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                    Box<
                        dyn ::core::future::Future<
                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >
                where
                    'life0: 'async_trait,
                    'life1: 'async_trait,
                    'life2: 'async_trait,
                    'life3: 'async_trait,
                    'life4: 'async_trait,
                    Self: 'async_trait,
                {
                    Box::pin(async move {
                        let __self = self;
                        let _: () = {
                            let id: PathParam<i64> = match <PathParam<
                                i64,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "id",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            let body: JsonBody<UpdateApplicationRequest> = match <JsonBody<
                                UpdateApplicationRequest,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "body",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            salvo::Writer::write(
                                    Self::update_app(id, body).await,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await;
                        };
                    })
                }
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_type_id_update_app() -> ::std::any::TypeId {
                ::std::any::TypeId::of::<update_app>()
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_update_app() -> salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                let mut components = salvo::oapi::Components::new();
                let status_codes: &[salvo::http::StatusCode] = &[];
                let mut operation = salvo::oapi::Operation::new();
                {
                    let mut components = &mut components;
                    let mut operation = &mut operation;
                    <PathParam<
                        i64,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointArgRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                        "id",
                    );
                    <JsonBody<
                        UpdateApplicationRequest,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointArgRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                        "body",
                    );
                    <Json<
                        RespVO<()>,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointOutRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                    );
                    operation.tags.push(("apps").into());
                    operation.summary = Some("更新应用".into());
                }
                if operation.operation_id.is_none() {
                    operation.operation_id = Some(
                        salvo::oapi::naming::assign_name::<
                            update_app,
                        >(salvo::oapi::naming::NameRule::Auto),
                    );
                }
                if !status_codes.is_empty() {
                    let responses = std::ops::DerefMut::deref_mut(
                        &mut operation.responses,
                    );
                    responses
                        .retain(|k, _| {
                            if let Ok(code) = <salvo::http::StatusCode as std::str::FromStr>::from_str(
                                k,
                            ) {
                                status_codes.contains(&code)
                            } else {
                                true
                            }
                        });
                }
                salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                    operation,
                    components,
                }
            }
            #[allow(non_upper_case_globals)]
            const _: () = {
                static __INVENTORY: ::inventory::Node = ::inventory::Node {
                    value: &{
                        salvo::oapi::EndpointRegistry::save(
                            __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_type_id_update_app,
                            __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_update_app,
                        )
                    },
                    next: ::inventory::core::cell::UnsafeCell::new(
                        ::inventory::core::option::Option::None,
                    ),
                };
                unsafe extern "C" fn __ctor() {
                    unsafe {
                        ::inventory::ErasedNode::submit(__INVENTORY.value, &__INVENTORY)
                    }
                }
                #[used]
                #[link_section = ".CRT$XCU"]
                static __CTOR: unsafe extern "C" fn() = __ctor;
            };
            /// DELETE /auth-admin/apps/{id} — 删除应用
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct delete_app;

                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "delete_app")
                }
            }
            impl delete_app {
                /// DELETE /auth-admin/apps/{id} — 删除应用
                async fn delete_app(id: PathParam<i64>) -> Json<RespVO<()>> {
                    {
                        match ApplicationAppService::delete_app(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(()) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("0", "ok")),
                            Err(msg) => Json(RespVO::from_error_info("-1", &msg)),
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

        pub mod app_proxy_handler {
            //! 应用权限代理 Handler
            //!
            //! 根据 app_id 查出目标微服务 base_url，
            //! 使用 reqwest::Client 将请求转发到目标服务的 /auth/* 端点。
            //! 代理直接透传目标微服务的原始 HTTP 响应（状态码 + body），不做 RespVO 包装。
            use salvo::prelude::*;
            use salvo::oapi::extract::*;
            use salvo::writing::Text;
            use crate::application::app_service::ApplicationAppService;
            /// 内部辅助：根据 app_id 获取 base_url
            async fn resolve_base_url(app_id: i64) -> Result<String, String> {
                let app = ApplicationAppService::get_app(app_id).await?;
                let status = app.status.unwrap_or(0);
                if status != 1 {
                    return Err("应用已禁用".to_string());
                }
                app.base_url.ok_or_else(|| "应用未配置访问地址".to_string())
            }
            /// 内部辅助：从请求中提取 Authorization 头
            fn extract_auth_header(req: &Request) -> Option<String> {
                req.headers()
                    .get("Authorization")
                    .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())
                    .map(|s| s.to_string())
            }
            /// 内部辅助：将目标服务的原始响应直接透传到 Salvo Response
            async fn forward_response(resp: reqwest::Response, res: &mut Response) {
                let status = resp.status();
                let salvo_status = StatusCode::from_u16(status.as_u16())
                    .unwrap_or(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR);
                res.status_code(salvo_status);
                match resp.text().await {
                    Ok(body) => {
                        res.render(Text::Json(body));
                    }
                    Err(e) => {
                        res.status_code(StatusCode::BAD_GATEWAY);
                        let err = ::serde_json::Value::Object({
                            let mut object = ::serde_json::Map::new();
                            let _ = object
                                .insert(
                                    ("code").into(),
                                    ::serde_json::to_value(&"-1").unwrap(),
                                );
                            let _ = object
                                .insert(
                                    ("msg").into(),
                                    ::serde_json::to_value(
                                            &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                    format_args!("读取目标响应失败: {0}", e),
                                                )
                                            }),
                                        )
                                        .unwrap(),
                                );
                            object
                        });
                        res.render(Text::Json(err.to_string()));
                    }
                }
            }
            /// 内部辅助：向 Salvo Response 写入 JSON 错误
            fn write_error(res: &mut Response, msg: &str) {
                res.status_code(StatusCode::BAD_GATEWAY);
                let err = ::serde_json::Value::Object({
                    let mut object = ::serde_json::Map::new();
                    let _ = object
                        .insert(("code").into(), ::serde_json::to_value(&"-1").unwrap());
                    let _ = object
                        .insert(("msg").into(), ::serde_json::to_value(&msg).unwrap());
                    object
                });
                res.render(Text::Json(err.to_string()));
            }
            /// GET /auth-admin/apps/{id}/schemas — 代理查询 API Schema
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct proxy_list_schemas;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for proxy_list_schemas {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "proxy_list_schemas")
                }
            }
            impl proxy_list_schemas {
                /// GET /auth-admin/apps/{id}/schemas — 代理查询 API Schema
                async fn proxy_list_schemas(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    req: &mut Request,
                    res: &mut Response,
                ) {
                    {
                        let auth_header = extract_auth_header(req);
                        let base_url = match resolve_base_url(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(u) => u,
                            Err(msg) => return write_error(res, &msg),
                        };
                        let query_string = req.uri().query().unwrap_or("");
                        let url = if query_string.is_empty() {
                            ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                    format_args!(
                                        "{0}/auth/schemas",
                                        base_url.trim_end_matches('/'),
                                    ),
                                )
                            })
                        } else {
                            ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                    format_args!(
                                        "{0}/auth/schemas?{1}",
                                        base_url.trim_end_matches('/'),
                                        query_string,
                                    ),
                                )
                            })
                        };
                        let mut builder = reqwest::Client::new().get(&url);
                        if let Some(auth) = &auth_header {
                            builder = builder.header("Authorization", auth.as_str());
                        }
                        match builder.send().await {
                            Ok(resp) => forward_response(resp, res).await,
                            Err(e) => {
                                write_error(
                                    res,
                                    &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                        ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                            format_args!("目标服务不可达: {0}", e),
                                        )
                                    }),
                                )
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for proxy_list_schemas {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,
                    clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,
                    clippy::type_complexity,
                    clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                    clippy::used_underscore_binding
                )]
                fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(
                    &'life0 self,
                    __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                    __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,
                    __macro_gen_res: &'life3 mut salvo::Response,
                    __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
                ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                    Box<
                        dyn ::core::future::Future<
                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >
                where
                    'life0: 'async_trait,
                    'life1: 'async_trait,
                    'life2: 'async_trait,
                    'life3: 'async_trait,
                    'life4: 'async_trait,
                    Self: 'async_trait,
                {
                    Box::pin(async move {
                        let __self = self;
                        let _: () = {
                            let id: PathParam<i64> = match <PathParam<
                                i64,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "id",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            Self::proxy_list_schemas(
                                    id,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await
                        };
                    })
                }
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_type_id_proxy_list_schemas() -> ::std::any::TypeId {
                ::std::any::TypeId::of::<proxy_list_schemas>()
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_proxy_list_schemas() -> salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                let mut components = salvo::oapi::Components::new();
                let status_codes: &[salvo::http::StatusCode] = &[];
                let mut operation = salvo::oapi::Operation::new();

                    let mut components = &mut components;

                            proxy_list_schemas,

                    );
                }
                if !status_codes.is_empty() {
                    let responses = std::ops::DerefMut::deref_mut(
                        &mut operation.responses,
                    );
                    responses
                        .retain(|k, _| {
                            if let Ok(code) = <salvo::http::StatusCode as std::str::FromStr>::from_str(
                                k,
                            ) {
                                status_codes.contains(&code)
                            } else {
                                true
                            }
                        });
                }
                salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                    operation,
                    components,
                }
            }

            const _: () = {

                    'life0: 'async_trait,

                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            Self::proxy_list_policies(
                                    id,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await
                        };
                    })
                }

            /// POST /auth-admin/apps/{id}/policies — 代理添加策略
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct proxy_add_policy;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for proxy_add_policy {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "proxy_add_policy")
                }
            }
            impl proxy_add_policy {
                /// POST /auth-admin/apps/{id}/policies — 代理添加策略
                async fn proxy_add_policy(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    req: &mut Request,
                    res: &mut Response,
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) {
                    {
                        let auth_header = extract_auth_header(req);
                        let base_url = match resolve_base_url(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(u) => u,
                            Err(msg) => return write_error(res, &msg),
                        };
                        let url = ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                format_args!(
                                    "{0}/auth/policies",
                                    base_url.trim_end_matches('/'),
                                ),
                            )
                        });
                        let mut builder = reqwest::Client::new()
                            .post(&url)
                            .json(&body.into_inner());
                        if let Some(auth) = &auth_header {
                            builder = builder.header("Authorization", auth.as_str());
                        }
                        match builder.send().await {
                            Ok(resp) => forward_response(resp, res).await,
                            Err(e) => {
                                write_error(
                                    res,
                                    &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                        ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                            format_args!("目标服务不可达: {0}", e),
                                        )
                                    }),
                                )
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

                /// DELETE /auth-admin/apps/{id}/policies/{policy_id} — 代理删除策略
                async fn proxy_remove_policy(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    policy_id: PathParam<i64>,
                    req: &mut Request,
                    res: &mut Response,
                ) {
                    {
                        let auth_header = extract_auth_header(req);
                        let base_url = match resolve_base_url(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(u) => u,
                            Err(msg) => return write_error(res, &msg),
                        };

                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                format_args!(
                                    "{0}/auth/policies/{1}",
                                    base_url.trim_end_matches('/'),
                                    policy_id.into_inner(),
                                ),
                            )
                        });
                        let mut builder = reqwest::Client::new().delete(&url);
                        if let Some(auth) = &auth_header {
                            builder = builder.header("Authorization", auth.as_str());
                        }
                        match builder.send().await {
                            Ok(resp) => forward_response(resp, res).await,
                            Err(e) => {
                                write_error(
                                    res,
                                    &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                        ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                            format_args!("目标服务不可达: {0}", e),
                                        )
                                    }),
                                )
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            /// GET /auth-admin/apps/{id}/roles — 代理查询角色
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct proxy_list_roles;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for proxy_list_roles {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "proxy_list_roles")
                }
            }
            impl proxy_list_roles {
                /// GET /auth-admin/apps/{id}/roles — 代理查询角色
                async fn proxy_list_roles(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    req: &mut Request,
                    res: &mut Response,
                ) {
                    {
                        let auth_header = extract_auth_header(req);
                        let base_url = match resolve_base_url(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(u) => u,
                            Err(msg) => return write_error(res, &msg),
                        };
                        let query_string = req.uri().query().unwrap_or("");
                        let url = if query_string.is_empty() {
                            ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                    format_args!(
                                        "{0}/auth/roles",
                                        base_url.trim_end_matches('/'),
                                    ),
                                )
                            })
                        } else {
                            ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                    format_args!(
                                        "{0}/auth/roles?{1}",
                                        base_url.trim_end_matches('/'),
                                        query_string,
                                    ),
                                )
                            })
                        };
                        let mut builder = reqwest::Client::new().get(&url);
                        if let Some(auth) = &auth_header {
                            builder = builder.header("Authorization", auth.as_str());
                        }
                        match builder.send().await {
                            Ok(resp) => forward_response(resp, res).await,
                            Err(e) => {
                                write_error(
                                    res,
                                    &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                        ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                            format_args!("目标服务不可达: {0}", e),
                                        )
                                    }),
                                )
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            /// POST /auth-admin/apps/{id}/roles — 代理添加角色
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct proxy_add_role;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for proxy_add_role {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "proxy_add_role")
                }
            }
            impl proxy_add_role {
                /// POST /auth-admin/apps/{id}/roles — 代理添加角色
                async fn proxy_add_role(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    req: &mut Request,
                    res: &mut Response,
                    body: JsonBody<serde_json::Value>,
                ) {
                    {
                        let auth_header = extract_auth_header(req);
                        let base_url = match resolve_base_url(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(u) => u,
                            Err(msg) => return write_error(res, &msg),
                        };
                        let url = ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                format_args!(
                                    "{0}/auth/roles",
                                    base_url.trim_end_matches('/'),
                                ),
                            )
                        });
                        let mut builder = reqwest::Client::new()
                            .post(&url)
                            .json(&body.into_inner());
                        if let Some(auth) = &auth_header {
                            builder = builder.header("Authorization", auth.as_str());
                        }
                        match builder.send().await {
                            Ok(resp) => forward_response(resp, res).await,
                            Err(e) => {
                                write_error(
                                    res,
                                    &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                        ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                            format_args!("目标服务不可达: {0}", e),
                                        )
                                    }),
                                )
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

                        .retain(|k, _| {

                                k,

                                status_codes.contains(&code)
                            } else {
                                true
                            }
                        });
                }

                    operation,
                    components,
                }

            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for proxy_list_groups {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "proxy_list_groups")
                }
            }
            impl proxy_list_groups {
                /// GET /auth-admin/apps/{id}/groups — 代理查询分组
                async fn proxy_list_groups(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    req: &mut Request,
                    res: &mut Response,
                ) {
                    {
                        let auth_header = extract_auth_header(req);
                        let base_url = match resolve_base_url(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(u) => u,
                            Err(msg) => return write_error(res, &msg),
                        };
                        let query_string = req.uri().query().unwrap_or("");
                        let url = if query_string.is_empty() {
                            ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                    format_args!(
                                        "{0}/auth/groups",
                                        base_url.trim_end_matches('/'),
                                    ),
                                )
                            })
                        } else {
                            ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                    format_args!(
                                        "{0}/auth/groups?{1}",
                                        base_url.trim_end_matches('/'),
                                        query_string,
                                    ),
                                )
                            })
                        };
                        let mut builder = reqwest::Client::new().get(&url);
                        if let Some(auth) = &auth_header {
                            builder = builder.header("Authorization", auth.as_str());
                        }
                        match builder.send().await {
                            Ok(resp) => forward_response(resp, res).await,
                            Err(e) => {
                                write_error(
                                    res,
                                    &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                        ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                            format_args!("目标服务不可达: {0}", e),
                                        )
                                    }),
                                )
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]

            #[automatically_derived]

                }

            impl proxy_remove_role {
                /// DELETE /auth-admin/apps/{id}/roles/{role_id} — 代理删除角色
                async fn proxy_remove_role(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    role_id: PathParam<i64>,
                    req: &mut Request,
                    res: &mut Response,
                ) {
                    {
                        let auth_header = extract_auth_header(req);
                        let base_url = match resolve_base_url(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(u) => u,
                            Err(msg) => return write_error(res, &msg),
                        };
                        let url = ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                format_args!(
                                    "{0}/auth/roles/{1}",
                                    base_url.trim_end_matches('/'),
                                    role_id.into_inner(),
                                ),
                            )
                        });
                        let mut builder = reqwest::Client::new().delete(&url);
                        if let Some(auth) = &auth_header {
                            builder = builder.header("Authorization", auth.as_str());
                        }
                        match builder.send().await {
                            Ok(resp) => forward_response(resp, res).await,
                            Err(e) => {
                                write_error(
                                    res,
                                    &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                        ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                            format_args!("目标服务不可达: {0}", e),
                                        )
                                    }),
                                )
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for proxy_remove_role {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,
                    clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,
                    clippy::type_complexity,
                    clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                    clippy::used_underscore_binding
                )]
                fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(
                    &'life0 self,
                    __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                    __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,
                    __macro_gen_res: &'life3 mut salvo::Response,
                    __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
                ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                    Box<
                        dyn ::core::future::Future<
                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >
                where
                    'life0: 'async_trait,
                    'life1: 'async_trait,
                    'life2: 'async_trait,
                    'life3: 'async_trait,
                    'life4: 'async_trait,
                    Self: 'async_trait,
                {
                    Box::pin(async move {
                        let __self = self;
                        let _: () = {
                            let id: PathParam<i64> = match <PathParam<
                                i64,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "id",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            let role_id: PathParam<i64> = match <PathParam<
                                i64,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "role_id",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            Self::proxy_remove_role(
                                    id,
                                    role_id,
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_res,
                                )
                                .await
                        };
                    })
                }
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_type_id_proxy_remove_role() -> ::std::any::TypeId {
                ::std::any::TypeId::of::<proxy_remove_role>()
            }
            fn __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_proxy_remove_role() -> salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                let mut components = salvo::oapi::Components::new();
                let status_codes: &[salvo::http::StatusCode] = &[];
                let mut operation = salvo::oapi::Operation::new();
                {
                    let mut components = &mut components;
                    let mut operation = &mut operation;
                    <PathParam<
                        i64,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointArgRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                        "id",
                    );
                    <PathParam<
                        i64,
                    > as salvo::oapi::EndpointArgRegister>::register(
                        components,
                        operation,
                        "role_id",
                    );
                    operation.tags.push(("app-proxy").into());
                    operation.summary = Some("代理删除应用角色分配".into());
                }
                if operation.operation_id.is_none() {
                    operation.operation_id = Some(
                        salvo::oapi::naming::assign_name::<
                            proxy_remove_role,
                        >(salvo::oapi::naming::NameRule::Auto),
                    );
                }
                if !status_codes.is_empty() {
                    let responses = std::ops::DerefMut::deref_mut(
                        &mut operation.responses,
                    );
                    responses
                        .retain(|k, _| {
                            if let Ok(code) = <salvo::http::StatusCode as std::str::FromStr>::from_str(
                                k,
                            ) {
                                status_codes.contains(&code)
                            } else {
                                true
                            }
                        });
                }
                salvo::oapi::Endpoint {
                    operation,
                    components,
                }
            }
            #[allow(non_upper_case_globals)]
            const _: () = {
                static __INVENTORY: ::inventory::Node = ::inventory::Node {
                    value: &{
                        salvo::oapi::EndpointRegistry::save(
                            __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_type_id_proxy_remove_role,
                            __macro_gen_oapi_endpoint_creator_proxy_remove_role,
                        )
                    },
                    next: ::inventory::core::cell::UnsafeCell::new(
                        ::inventory::core::option::Option::None,
                    ),
                };
                unsafe extern "C" fn __ctor() {
                    unsafe {
                        ::inventory::ErasedNode::submit(__INVENTORY.value, &__INVENTORY)
                    }
                }
                #[used]
                #[link_section = ".CRT$XCU"]
                static __CTOR: unsafe extern "C" fn() = __ctor;
            };
            /// DELETE /auth-admin/apps/{id}/groups/{group_id} — 代理删除分组
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct proxy_remove_group;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for proxy_remove_group {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "proxy_remove_group")
                }
            }
            impl proxy_remove_group {
                /// DELETE /auth-admin/apps/{id}/groups/{group_id} — 代理删除分组
                async fn proxy_remove_group(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    group_id: PathParam<i64>,
                    req: &mut Request,
                    res: &mut Response,
                ) {
                    {
                        let auth_header = extract_auth_header(req);
                        let base_url = match resolve_base_url(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(u) => u,
                            Err(msg) => return write_error(res, &msg),
                        };
                        let url = ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                format_args!(
                                    "{0}/auth/groups/{1}",
                                    base_url.trim_end_matches('/'),
                                    group_id.into_inner(),
                                ),
                            )
                        });
                        let mut builder = reqwest::Client::new().delete(&url);
                        if let Some(auth) = &auth_header {
                            builder = builder.header("Authorization", auth.as_str());
                        }
                        match builder.send().await {
                            Ok(resp) => forward_response(resp, res).await,
                            Err(e) => {
                                write_error(
                                    res,
                                    &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                        ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                            format_args!("目标服务不可达: {0}", e),
                                        )
                                    }),
                                )
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for proxy_remove_group {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,

            /// POST /auth-admin/apps/{id}/reload — 代理重载 Enforcer
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            pub struct proxy_reload;
            #[automatically_derived]
            #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
            impl ::core::fmt::Debug for proxy_reload {
                #[inline]
                fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "proxy_reload")
                }
            }
            impl proxy_reload {
                /// POST /auth-admin/apps/{id}/reload — 代理重载 Enforcer
                async fn proxy_reload(
                    id: PathParam<i64>,
                    req: &mut Request,
                    res: &mut Response,
                ) {
                    {
                        let auth_header = extract_auth_header(req);
                        let base_url = match resolve_base_url(id.into_inner()).await {
                            Ok(u) => u,
                            Err(msg) => return write_error(res, &msg),
                        };
                        let url = ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                format_args!(
                                    "{0}/auth/reload",
                                    base_url.trim_end_matches('/'),
                                ),
                            )
                        });
                        let mut builder = reqwest::Client::new().post(&url);
                        if let Some(auth) = &auth_header {
                            builder = builder.header("Authorization", auth.as_str());
                        }
                        match builder.send().await {
                            Ok(resp) => forward_response(resp, res).await,
                            Err(e) => {
                                write_error(
                                    res,
                                    &::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                        ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                            format_args!("目标服务不可达: {0}", e),
                                        )
                                    }),
                                )
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            impl salvo::Handler for proxy_reload {
                #[allow(
                    elided_named_lifetimes,
                    clippy::async_yields_async,
                    clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                    clippy::let_unit_value,
                    clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                    clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                    clippy::shadow_same,
                    clippy::type_complexity,
                    clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                    clippy::used_underscore_binding
                )]
                fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(
                    &'life0 self,
                    __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                    __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,
                    __macro_gen_res: &'life3 mut salvo::Response,
                    __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
                ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                    Box<
                        dyn ::core::future::Future<
                            Output = (),
                        > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                    >,
                >
                where
                    'life0: 'async_trait,
                    'life1: 'async_trait,
                    'life2: 'async_trait,
                    'life3: 'async_trait,
                    'life4: 'async_trait,
                    Self: 'async_trait,
                {
                    Box::pin(async move {
                        let __self = self;
                        let _: () = {
                            let id: PathParam<i64> = match <PathParam<
                                i64,
                            > as salvo::Extractible>::extract_with_arg(
                                    __macro_gen_req,
                                    __macro_gen_depot,
                                    "id",
                                )
                                .await
                            {
                                Ok(data) => data,
                                Err(e) => {
                                    e.write(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_depot, __macro_gen_res)
                                        .await;
                                    let status_code = __macro_gen_res
                                        .status_code
                                        .unwrap_or_default();
                                    if !status_code.is_client_error()
                                        && !status_code.is_server_error()
                                    {
                                        __macro_gen_res
                                            .status_code(salvo::http::StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST);
                                    }
                                    return;
                                }
                            };
                            Self::proxy_reload(id, __macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_res)
                                .await
                        };
                    })
                }
            }
