    pub mod router {
        //! 路由配置
        //!
        //! 汇总所有 HTTP 路由，区分公开路由（不需要认证）和受保护路由。
        use salvo::prelude::*;
        use super::handler::{
            auth_handler, user_handler, role_handler, permission_handler,
            department_handler, application_handler, app_proxy_handler,
        };
        use super::admin_ui;
        /// 构建不需要认证的公开路由（登录、登出、刷新 Token）
        pub fn public_routes() -> Router {
            Router::new()
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("/auth-admin")
                        .push(Router::with_path("/login").post(auth_handler::auth_login))
                        .push(
                            Router::with_path("/logout").post(auth_handler::auth_logout),
                        )
                        .push(
                            Router::with_path("/refresh")
                                .post(auth_handler::refresh_token),
                        ),
                )
                .push(admin_ui::auth_admin_ui_router())
        }
        /// 构建需要认证的受保护路由
        pub fn protected_routes() -> Router {
            Router::new()
                .push(auth_protected_routes())
                .push(user_routes())
                .push(role_routes())
                .push(permission_routes())
                .push(department_routes())
                .push(app_routes())
                .push(app_proxy_routes())
        }
        fn auth_protected_routes() -> Router {
            Router::with_path("/auth-admin")
                .push(Router::with_path("/me").get(auth_handler::get_me))
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("/me/password").put(auth_handler::change_password),
                )
        }
        fn user_routes() -> Router {
            Router::with_path("/auth-admin/users")
                .get(user_handler::list_users)
                .post(user_handler::create_user)
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("{id}")
                        .get(user_handler::get_user)
                        .put(user_handler::update_user)
                        .delete(user_handler::delete_user),
                )
                .push(Router::with_path("{id}/status").put(user_handler::update_status))
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("{id}/reset-password")
                        .put(user_handler::reset_password),
                )
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("{id}/roles")
                        .get(user_handler::get_user_roles)
                        .post(user_handler::assign_user_role)
                        .push(
                            Router::with_path("{role_id}")
                                .delete(user_handler::revoke_user_role),
                        ),
                )
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("{id}/permissions")
                        .get(user_handler::get_user_permissions),
                )
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("batch-delete")
                        .post(user_handler::batch_delete_users),
                )
        }
        fn role_routes() -> Router {
            Router::with_path("/auth-admin/roles")
                .get(role_handler::list_roles)
                .post(role_handler::create_role)
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("{id}")
                        .get(role_handler::get_role)
                        .put(role_handler::update_role)
                        .delete(role_handler::delete_role),
                )
                .push(Router::with_path("{id}/users").get(role_handler::get_role_users))
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("{id}/permissions")
                        .get(role_handler::get_role_permissions)
                        .post(role_handler::assign_role_permission)
                        .push(
                            Router::with_path("{perm_id}")
                                .delete(role_handler::revoke_role_permission),
                        ),
                )
        }
        fn permission_routes() -> Router {
            Router::with_path("/auth-admin/permissions")
                .get(permission_handler::list_permissions)
                .post(permission_handler::create_permission)
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("{id}")
                        .get(permission_handler::get_permission)
                        .put(permission_handler::update_permission)
                        .delete(permission_handler::delete_permission),
                )
        }
        fn department_routes() -> Router {
            Router::with_path("/auth-admin/departments")
                .get(department_handler::list_departments)
                .post(department_handler::create_department)
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("{id}")
                        .get(department_handler::get_department)
                        .put(department_handler::update_department)
                        .delete(department_handler::delete_department),
                )
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("{id}/move/{parent_id}")
                        .put(department_handler::move_department),
                )
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("{id}/users")
                        .get(department_handler::get_department_users),
                )
        }
        fn app_routes() -> Router {
            Router::with_path("/auth-admin/apps")
                .get(application_handler::list_apps)
                .post(application_handler::create_app)
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("{id}")
                        .get(application_handler::get_app)
                        .put(application_handler::update_app)
                        .delete(application_handler::delete_app),
                )
        }
        fn app_proxy_routes() -> Router {
            Router::with_path("/auth-admin/apps/{id}")
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("schemas")
                        .get(app_proxy_handler::proxy_list_schemas),
                )
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("policies")
                        .get(app_proxy_handler::proxy_list_policies)
                        .post(app_proxy_handler::proxy_add_policy),
                )
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("policies/{policy_id}")
                        .delete(app_proxy_handler::proxy_remove_policy),
                )
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("roles")
                        .get(app_proxy_handler::proxy_list_roles)
                        .post(app_proxy_handler::proxy_add_role),
                )
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("roles/{role_id}")
                        .delete(app_proxy_handler::proxy_remove_role),
                )
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("groups")
                        .get(app_proxy_handler::proxy_list_groups)
                        .post(app_proxy_handler::proxy_add_group),
                )
                .push(
                    Router::with_path("groups/{group_id}")
                        .delete(app_proxy_handler::proxy_remove_group),
                )
                .push(Router::with_path("reload").post(app_proxy_handler::proxy_reload))
        }
    }
    pub mod admin_ui {
        //! Admin UI 静态资源服务模块
        //!
        //! 使用 rust-embed 将前端构建产物嵌入到二进制中，
        //! 并通过 Salvo 路由提供静态资源服务。
        //!
        //! # 特性
        //! - 自动 MIME 类型推断
        //! - SPA fallback 支持（未匹配路径返回 index.html）
        //! - 智能缓存控制（assets 长期缓存，index.html 不缓存）
        use rust_embed::Embed;
        use salvo::http::header::{CACHE_CONTROL, CONTENT_TYPE};
        use salvo::http::ResBody;
        use salvo::prelude::*;
        /// 嵌入 static/ 目录下的所有前端资源
        #[folder = "static/"]
        struct AdminUiAssets;
        impl AdminUiAssets {
            fn matcher() -> rust_embed::utils::PathMatcher {
                const INCLUDES: &[&str] = &[];
                const EXCLUDES: &[&str] = &[];
                static PATH_MATCHER: ::std::sync::OnceLock<
                    rust_embed::utils::PathMatcher,
                > = ::std::sync::OnceLock::new();
                PATH_MATCHER
                    .get_or_init(|| rust_embed::utils::PathMatcher::new(
                        INCLUDES,
                        EXCLUDES,
                    ))
                    .clone()
            }
            /// Get an embedded file and its metadata.
            pub fn get(
                file_path: &str,
            ) -> ::std::option::Option<rust_embed::EmbeddedFile> {
                let rel_file_path = file_path.replace("\\", "/");
                let file_path = ::std::path::Path::new(
                        "D:\\tdcare\\genies\\crates\\auth-admin\\static/",
                    )
                    .join(&rel_file_path);
                let canonical_file_path = file_path.canonicalize().ok()?;
                if !canonical_file_path
                    .starts_with("\\\\?\\D:\\tdcare\\genies\\crates\\auth-admin\\static")
                {
                    let metadata = ::std::fs::symlink_metadata(&file_path).ok()?;
                    if !metadata.is_symlink() {
                        return ::std::option::Option::None;
                    }
                }
                let path_matcher = Self::matcher();
                if path_matcher.is_path_included(&rel_file_path) {
                    rust_embed::utils::read_file_from_fs(&canonical_file_path).ok()
                } else {
                    ::std::option::Option::None
                }
            }
            /// Iterates over the file paths in the folder.
            pub fn iter() -> impl ::std::iter::Iterator<
                Item = ::std::borrow::Cow<'static, str>,
            > {
                use ::std::path::Path;
                rust_embed::utils::get_files(
                        ::std::string::String::from(
                            "D:\\tdcare\\genies\\crates\\auth-admin\\static/",
                        ),
                        Self::matcher(),
                    )
                    .map(|e| ::std::borrow::Cow::from(e.rel_path))
            }
        }
        impl rust_embed::RustEmbed for AdminUiAssets {
            fn get(file_path: &str) -> ::std::option::Option<rust_embed::EmbeddedFile> {
                AdminUiAssets::get(file_path)
            }
            fn iter() -> rust_embed::Filenames {
                rust_embed::Filenames::Dynamic(
                    ::std::boxed::Box::new(AdminUiAssets::iter()),
                )
            }
        }
        /// 静态资源服务 Handler
        #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
        struct serve_admin_ui;
        #[automatically_derived]
        #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
        impl ::core::fmt::Debug for serve_admin_ui {
            #[inline]
            fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "serve_admin_ui")
            }
        }
        impl serve_admin_ui {
            /// 静态资源服务 Handler
            async fn serve_admin_ui(req: &mut Request, res: &mut Response) {
                {
                    let path = req.param::<String>("path").unwrap_or_default();
                    let path = path.trim_start_matches('/');
                    let path = if path.is_empty() { "index.html" } else { path };
                    match AdminUiAssets::get(path) {
                        Some(content) => {
                            serve_embedded_file(res, path, &content.data);
                        }
                        None => {
                            if let Some(index) = AdminUiAssets::get("index.html") {
                                serve_embedded_file(res, "index.html", &index.data);
                            } else {
                                res.status_code(StatusCode::NOT_FOUND);
                                res.render(Text::Plain("404 Not Found"));
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        impl salvo::Handler for serve_admin_ui {
            #[allow(
                elided_named_lifetimes,
                clippy::async_yields_async,
                clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                clippy::let_unit_value,
                clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                clippy::shadow_same,
                clippy::type_complexity,
                clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                clippy::used_underscore_binding
            )]
            fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(
                &'life0 self,
                __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,
                __macro_gen_res: &'life3 mut salvo::Response,
                __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
            ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                Box<
                    dyn ::core::future::Future<
                        Output = (),
                    > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                >,
            >
            where
                'life0: 'async_trait,
                'life1: 'async_trait,
                'life2: 'async_trait,
                'life3: 'async_trait,
                'life4: 'async_trait,
                Self: 'async_trait,
            {
                Box::pin(async move {
                    let __self = self;
                    let _: () = {
                        Self::serve_admin_ui(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_res).await
                    };
                })
            }
        }
        /// 将嵌入的文件内容写入响应
        fn serve_embedded_file(res: &mut Response, path: &str, data: &[u8]) {
            let mime_type = mime_guess::from_path(path)
                .first_or_octet_stream()
                .to_string();
            res.headers_mut().insert(CONTENT_TYPE, mime_type.parse().unwrap());
            let cache_control = if path == "index.html" {
                "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"
            } else if path.starts_with("assets/") {
                "public, max-age=31536000, immutable"
            } else {
                "public, max-age=3600"
            };
            res.headers_mut().insert(CACHE_CONTROL, cache_control.parse().unwrap());
            res.body(ResBody::Once(data.to_vec().into()));
        }
        /// 创建 Admin UI 路由
        ///
        /// # 访问路径
        /// - `/auth-admin/ui/` - 主页面
        /// - `/auth-admin/ui/assets/*` - 静态资源
        /// - `/auth-admin/ui/*` - SPA 子路由（fallback 到 index.html）
        pub fn auth_admin_ui_router() -> Router {
            Router::with_path("auth-admin/ui")
                .get(serve_admin_ui_entry)
                .push(Router::with_path("{**path}").get(serve_admin_ui))
        }
        /// 处理 /auth-admin/ui 和 /auth-admin/ui/ 的入口
        #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
        struct serve_admin_ui_entry;
        #[automatically_derived]
        #[allow(non_camel_case_types)]
        impl ::core::fmt::Debug for serve_admin_ui_entry {
            #[inline]
            fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
                ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "serve_admin_ui_entry")
            }
        }
        impl serve_admin_ui_entry {
            /// 处理 /auth-admin/ui 和 /auth-admin/ui/ 的入口
            async fn serve_admin_ui_entry(req: &mut Request, res: &mut Response) {
                {
                    let path = req.uri().path().to_string();
                    if !path.ends_with('/') {
                        res.render(
                            Redirect::other(
                                ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(format_args!("{0}/", path))
                                }),
                            ),
                        );
                    } else {
                        if let Some(index) = AdminUiAssets::get("index.html") {
                            serve_embedded_file(res, "index.html", &index.data);
                        } else {
                            res.status_code(StatusCode::NOT_FOUND);
                            res.render(Text::Plain("404 Not Found"));
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        impl salvo::Handler for serve_admin_ui_entry {
            #[allow(
                elided_named_lifetimes,
                clippy::async_yields_async,
                clippy::diverging_sub_expression,
                clippy::let_unit_value,
                clippy::needless_arbitrary_self_type,
                clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding,
                clippy::shadow_same,
                clippy::type_complexity,
                clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds,
                clippy::used_underscore_binding
            )]
            fn handle<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'life3, 'life4, 'async_trait>(
                &'life0 self,
                __macro_gen_req: &'life1 mut salvo::Request,
                __macro_gen_depot: &'life2 mut salvo::Depot,
                __macro_gen_res: &'life3 mut salvo::Response,
                __macro_gen_ctrl: &'life4 mut salvo::FlowCtrl,
            ) -> ::core::pin::Pin<
                Box<
                    dyn ::core::future::Future<
                        Output = (),
                    > + ::core::marker::Send + 'async_trait,
                >,
            >
            where
                'life0: 'async_trait,
                'life1: 'async_trait,
                'life2: 'async_trait,
                'life3: 'async_trait,
                'life4: 'async_trait,
                Self: 'async_trait,
            {
                Box::pin(async move {
                    let __self = self;
                    let _: () = {
                        Self::serve_admin_ui_entry(__macro_gen_req, __macro_gen_res)
                            .await
                    };
                })
            }
        }
    }
}
pub mod infrastructure {
    //! 基础设施层
    pub mod migration {
        //! 数据库迁移基础设施
        use flyway::MigrationRunner;
        use flyway_rbatis::RbatisMigrationDriver;
        use std::sync::Arc;
        use genies::context::CONTEXT;
        pub struct Migrations {}
        impl flyway::MigrationStore for Migrations {

                    (
                        7u64,
                        "_create_message_table".to_string(),
                        "-- 领域事件 Outbox 模式消息表\r\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS message (\r\n    id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,\r\n    destination VARCHAR(255),\r\n    headers TEXT,\r\n    payload TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n    published INT DEFAULT 0,\r\n    creation_time BIGINT\r\n);\r\n--! may_fail: true\r\nCREATE INDEX idx_message_published ON message (published);\r\n",
                    ),
                    (
                        8u64,
                        "_create_auth_applications".to_string(),
                        "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS auth_applications (\r\n    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,\r\n    app_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE COMMENT '应用标识',\r\n    display_name VARCHAR(256) COMMENT '显示名称',\r\n    description VARCHAR(512) COMMENT '应用描述',\r\n    base_url VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL COMMENT '微服务访问地址',\r\n    status TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '1=启用 0=禁用',\r\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\r\n);\r\n\r\n-- 默认应用：认证管理中心（自身）\r\nINSERT INTO auth_applications (app_name, display_name, description, base_url, status)\r\nVALUES ('auth-admin', '认证管理中心', '统一认证与权限管理微服务', 'http://localhost:9099', 1)\r\nON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE display_name = VALUES(display_name);\r\n",
                    ),
                ]
                    .iter()
                    .map(|migration| {
                        ChangelogFile::from_string(
                                migration.0,
                                migration.1.to_string().as_str(),
                                migration.2,
                            )
                            .unwrap()
                    })
                    .collect();
                return result;
            }
        }
        pub async fn run_migrations() {
            let rbatis = Arc::new(CONTEXT.rbatis.clone());
            let driver = Arc::new(RbatisMigrationDriver::new(rbatis, None));
            let runner = MigrationRunner::new(
                Migrations {},
                driver.clone(),
                driver.clone(),
                false,
            );
            match runner.migrate().await {
                Ok(v) => {
                    let lvl = ::log::Level::Info;
                    if lvl <= ::log::STATIC_MAX_LEVEL && lvl <= ::log::max_level() {
                        ::log::__private_api::log(
                            { ::log::__private_api::GlobalLogger },
                            format_args!(
                                "[auth-admin] 数据库迁移完成, 版本: {0:?}",
                                v,
                            ),
                            lvl,
                            &(
                                "genies_auth_admin::infrastructure::migration",
                                "genies_auth_admin::infrastructure::migration",
                                ::log::__private_api::loc(),
                            ),
                            (),
                        );
                    }
                }
                Err(e) => {
                    let lvl = ::log::Level::Warn;
                    if lvl <= ::log::STATIC_MAX_LEVEL && lvl <= ::log::max_level() {
                        ::log::__private_api::log(
                            { ::log::__private_api::GlobalLogger },
                            format_args!(
                                "[auth-admin] 数据库迁移警告: {0}, 继续启动",
                                e,
                            ),
                            lvl,
                            &(
                                "genies_auth_admin::infrastructure::migration",
                                "genies_auth_admin::infrastructure::migration",
                                ::log::__private_api::loc(),
                            ),
                            (),
                        );
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
